Ļšīįėåģą ā ņīģ, ÷ņī `Extern IID_ICgiAsyncIoTask` īįś’āėåķ ā `ICgiAsyncIoTask.bi`, ą ā `CgiAsyncTask.bas` ģū ļīļūņąėčńü īļšåäåėčņü åćī ÷åšåē `Dim`, ÷ņī āūēūāąåņ äóįėčšīāąķčå.  
Ķóęķī:  
1. Óäąėčņü ńņšīźó `Dim IID_ICgiAsyncIoTask ...` čē `src/CgiAsyncTask.bas`.  
2. Ńīēäąņü īņäåėüķūé ōąéė `src/ICgiAsyncIoTask.bas`, ā źīņīšīģ įóäåņ šåąėüķīå īļšåäåėåķčå żņīćī čäåķņčōčźąņīšą ń ąėčąńīģ, ÷ņīįū ėčķźåš åćī ķąųøė.

Ļšåäėąćąž ńėåäóžłčå čēģåķåķč’.

src/ICgiAsyncIoTask.bas  
```
#include once "ICgiAsyncIoTask.bi"

' Define the IID with the same alias as declared in the header
Dim Shared Alias "IID_ICgiAsyncIoTask" IID_ICgiAsyncIoTask As Const IID = Type<GUID>( _
    &hA1B2C3D4, &hE5F6, &h7890, &h01, &h23, &h45, &h67, &h89, &hAB, &hCD, &hEF _
)
```

src/CgiAsyncTask.bas  
```
#include once "CgiAsyncTask.bi"
#include once "AsyncResult.bi"
#include once "Logger.bi"
#include once "windows.bi"

Extern GlobalCgiReadStdoutAsyncTaskVirtualTable As Const ICgiAsyncIoTaskVirtualTable
Extern GlobalCgiWriteStdinAsyncTaskVirtualTable As Const ICgiAsyncIoTaskVirtualTable

Type CgiReadThreadData
	pTask As CgiReadStdoutAsyncTask Ptr
	pResult As IAsyncResult Ptr
End Type

Type CgiWriteThreadData
	pTask As CgiWriteStdinAsyncTask Ptr
	pResult As IAsyncResult Ptr
End Type

' -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
' CgiReadStdoutAsyncTask
' -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Private Sub InitializeCgiReadStdoutAsyncTask( _
		ByVal self As CgiReadStdoutAsyncTask Ptr, _
		ByVal pIMemoryAllocator As IMalloc Ptr, _
		ByVal hPipeRead As HANDLE, _
		ByVal dwBufSize As DWORD _
	)

	#if __FB_DEBUG__
		CopyMemory( _
			@self->RttiClassName(0), _
			@Str(RTTI_ID_CGIREADSTDOUTASYNCTASK), _
			UBound(self->RttiClassName) - LBound(self->RttiClassName) + 1 _
		)
	#endif
	self->lpVtbl = @GlobalCgiReadStdoutAsyncTaskVirtualTable
	self->ReferenceCounter = 0
	IMalloc_AddRef(pIMemoryAllocator)
	self->pIMemoryAllocator = pIMemoryAllocator
	self->hPipeRead = hPipeRead
	self->hPipeWrite = NULL
	self->dwBufSize = dwBufSize
	self->dwBytesRead = 0
	self->pResult = NULL
	self->pBuffer = IMalloc_Alloc(pIMemoryAllocator, dwBufSize)

End Sub

Private Sub UnInitializeCgiReadStdoutAsyncTask( _
		ByVal self As CgiReadStdoutAsyncTask Ptr _
	)

	If self->pBuffer Then
		IMalloc_Free(self->pIMemoryAllocator, self->pBuffer)
	End If

	If self->pResult Then
		IAsyncResult_Release(self->pResult)
	End If

End Sub

Private Sub DestroyCgiReadStdoutAsyncTask( _
		ByVal self As CgiReadStdoutAsyncTask Ptr _
	)

	Dim pIMemoryAllocator As IMalloc Ptr = self->pIMemoryAllocator

	UnInitializeCgiReadStdoutAsyncTask(self)

	IMalloc_Free(pIMemoryAllocator, self)

	IMalloc_Release(pIMemoryAllocator)

End Sub

Private Function CgiReadStdoutAsyncTaskAddRef( _
		ByVal self As CgiReadStdoutAsyncTask Ptr _
	)As ULONG

	self->ReferenceCounter += 1
	Return 1

End Function

Private Function CgiReadStdoutAsyncTaskRelease( _
		ByVal self As CgiReadStdoutAsyncTask Ptr _
	)As ULONG

	self->ReferenceCounter -= 1
	If self->ReferenceCounter Then
		Return 1
	End If

	DestroyCgiReadStdoutAsyncTask(self)
	Return 0

End Function

Private Function CgiReadStdoutAsyncTaskQueryInterface( _
		ByVal self As CgiReadStdoutAsyncTask Ptr, _
		ByVal riid As REFIID, _
		ByVal ppv As Any Ptr Ptr _
	)As HRESULT

	If IsEqualIID(@IID_ICgiAsyncIoTask, riid) Then
		*ppv = @self->lpVtbl
	Else
		If IsEqualIID(@IID_IAsyncIoTask, riid) Then
			*ppv = @self->lpVtbl
		Else
			If IsEqualIID(@IID_IUnknown, riid) Then
				*ppv = @self->lpVtbl
			Else
				*ppv = NULL
				Return E_NOINTERFACE
			End If
		End If
	End If

	CgiReadStdoutAsyncTaskAddRef(self)
	Return S_OK

End Function

Public Function CreateCgiReadStdoutAsyncTask( _
		ByVal pIMemoryAllocator As IMalloc Ptr, _
		ByVal hPipeRead As HANDLE, _
		ByVal dwBufSize As DWORD, _
		ByVal riid As REFIID, _
		ByVal ppv As Any Ptr Ptr _
	)As HRESULT

	Dim self As CgiReadStdoutAsyncTask Ptr = IMalloc_Alloc( _
		pIMemoryAllocator, _
		SizeOf(CgiReadStdoutAsyncTask) _
	)

	If self Then
		InitializeCgiReadStdoutAsyncTask(self, pIMemoryAllocator, hPipeRead, dwBufSize)

		Dim hrQueryInterface As HRESULT = CgiReadStdoutAsyncTaskQueryInterface( _
			self, _
			riid, _
			ppv _
		)
		If FAILED(hrQueryInterface) Then
			DestroyCgiReadStdoutAsyncTask(self)
		End If

		Return hrQueryInterface
	End If

	*ppv = NULL
	Return E_OUTOFMEMORY

End Function


Private Function ReadPipeThreadProc( _
		ByVal lpParameter As LPVOID _
	)As DWORD

	Dim ptd As CgiReadThreadData Ptr = CPtr(CgiReadThreadData Ptr, lpParameter)
	Dim self As CgiReadStdoutAsyncTask Ptr = ptd->pTask
	Dim pRes As IAsyncResult Ptr = ptd->pResult

	Dim dwRead As DWORD = 0
	Dim dwError As DWORD = 0
	Dim bResult As BOOLEAN = ReadFile( _
		self->hPipeRead, _
		self->pBuffer, _
		self->dwBufSize, _
		@dwRead, _
		NULL _
	)

	If bResult = 0 Then
		dwError = GetLastError()
		Select Case dwError
			Case ERROR_BROKEN_PIPE, ERROR_HANDLE_EOF
				dwRead = 0
				dwError = 0
			Case Else
				LogWriteEntry(LogEntryType.Error, WStr("ReadFile failed"), NULL)
		End Select
	End If

	IAsyncResult_SetCompleted(pRes, dwRead, TRUE, dwError)
	self->dwBytesRead = dwRead

	Dim pcb As AsyncCallback = NULL
	IAsyncResult_GetAsyncCallback(pRes, @pcb)
	If pcb Then
		pcb(pRes)
	End If

	IAsyncResult_Release(pRes)
	CgiReadStdoutAsyncTaskRelease(self)

	IMalloc_Free(self->pIMemoryAllocator, ptd)

	Return 0

End Function

Private Function CgiReadStdoutAsyncTaskBeginExecute( _
		ByVal self As CgiReadStdoutAsyncTask Ptr, _
		ByVal pcb As AsyncCallback, _
		ByVal StateObject As Any Ptr, _
		ByVal ppIResult As IAsyncResult Ptr Ptr _
	)As HRESULT

	Dim pResult As IAsyncResult Ptr = NULL
	Dim hrCreateResult As HRESULT = CreateAsyncResult( _
		self->pIMemoryAllocator, _
		@IID_IAsyncResult, _
		@pResult _
	)

	If FAILED(hrCreateResult) Then
		*ppIResult = NULL
		Return hrCreateResult
	End If

	IAsyncResult_SetAsyncStateWeakPtr(pResult, pcb, StateObject)

	Dim ptd As CgiReadThreadData Ptr = IMalloc_Alloc( _
		self->pIMemoryAllocator, _
		SizeOf(CgiReadThreadData) _
	)

	If ptd = NULL Then
		IAsyncResult_Release(pResult)
		*ppIResult = NULL
		Return E_OUTOFMEMORY
	End If

	ptd->pTask = self
	ptd->pResult = pResult

	CgiReadStdoutAsyncTaskAddRef(self)
	IAsyncResult_AddRef(pResult)

	Dim hThread As HANDLE = CreateThread( _
		NULL, _
		0, _
		@ReadPipeThreadProc, _
		ptd, _
		0, _
		NULL _
	)

	If hThread = NULL Then
		IAsyncResult_Release(pResult)
		CgiReadStdoutAsyncTaskRelease(self)
		IMalloc_Free(self->pIMemoryAllocator, ptd)
		*ppIResult = NULL
		Return E_FAIL
	End If

	CloseHandle(hThread)

	*ppIResult = pResult
	Return S_OK

End Function

Private Function CgiReadStdoutAsyncTaskEndExecute( _
		ByVal self As CgiReadStdoutAsyncTask Ptr, _
		ByVal pIResult As IAsyncResult Ptr _
	)As HRESULT

	Return S_OK

End Function

' ICgiAsyncIoTask methods for read task
Private Function CgiReadStdoutAsyncTaskGetReadPipeHandle( _
		ByVal self As CgiReadStdoutAsyncTask Ptr, _
		ByVal phRead As HANDLE Ptr _
	)As HRESULT

	*phRead = self->hPipeRead
	Return S_OK

End Function

Private Function CgiReadStdoutAsyncTaskSetReadPipeHandle( _
		ByVal self As CgiReadStdoutAsyncTask Ptr, _
		ByVal hRead As HANDLE _
	)As HRESULT

	If self->hPipeRead <> NULL And self->hPipeRead <> INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE Then
		CloseHandle(self->hPipeRead)
	End If
	self->hPipeRead = hRead
	Return S_OK

End Function

Private Function CgiReadStdoutAsyncTaskGetWritePipeHandle( _
		ByVal self As CgiReadStdoutAsyncTask Ptr, _
		ByVal phWrite As HANDLE Ptr _
	)As HRESULT

	*phWrite = self->hPipeWrite
	Return S_OK

End Function

Private Function CgiReadStdoutAsyncTaskSetWritePipeHandle( _
		ByVal self As CgiReadStdoutAsyncTask Ptr, _
		ByVal hWrite As HANDLE _
	)As HRESULT

	If self->hPipeWrite <> NULL And self->hPipeWrite <> INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE Then
		CloseHandle(self->hPipeWrite)
	End If
	self->hPipeWrite = hWrite
	Return S_OK

End Function

Private Function CgiReadStdoutAsyncTaskGetBuffer( _
		ByVal self As CgiReadStdoutAsyncTask Ptr, _
		ByVal ppBuffer As BYTE Ptr Ptr _
	)As HRESULT

	*ppBuffer = self->pBuffer
	Return S_OK

End Function

Private Function CgiReadStdoutAsyncTaskSetBuffer( _
		ByVal self As CgiReadStdoutAsyncTask Ptr, _
		ByVal pBuffer As BYTE Ptr _
	)As HRESULT

	If self->pBuffer Then
		IMalloc_Free(self->pIMemoryAllocator, self->pBuffer)
	End If
	self->pBuffer = pBuffer
	Return S_OK

End Function

' VTable for CgiReadStdoutAsyncTask
Private Function ICgiAsyncIoTask_QueryInterface_Read( _
		ByVal self As ICgiAsyncIoTask Ptr, _
		ByVal riid As REFIID, _
		ByVal ppvObject As Any Ptr Ptr _
	)As HRESULT
	Return CgiReadStdoutAsyncTaskQueryInterface(CONTAINING_RECORD(self, CgiReadStdoutAsyncTask, lpVtbl), riid, ppvObject)
End Function

Private Function ICgiAsyncIoTask_AddRef_Read( _
		ByVal self As ICgiAsyncIoTask Ptr _
	)As ULONG
	Return CgiReadStdoutAsyncTaskAddRef(CONTAINING_RECORD(self, CgiReadStdoutAsyncTask, lpVtbl))
End Function

Private Function ICgiAsyncIoTask_Release_Read( _
		ByVal self As ICgiAsyncIoTask Ptr _
	)As ULONG
	Return CgiReadStdoutAsyncTaskRelease(CONTAINING_RECORD(self, CgiReadStdoutAsyncTask, lpVtbl))
End Function

Private Function ICgiAsyncIoTask_BeginExecute_Read( _
		ByVal self As ICgiAsyncIoTask Ptr, _
		ByVal pcb As AsyncCallback, _
		ByVal state As Any Ptr, _
		ByVal ppIResult As IAsyncResult Ptr Ptr _
	)As HRESULT
	Return CgiReadStdoutAsyncTaskBeginExecute(CONTAINING_RECORD(self, CgiReadStdoutAsyncTask, lpVtbl), pcb, state, ppIResult)
End Function

Private Function ICgiAsyncIoTask_EndExecute_Read( _
		ByVal self As ICgiAsyncIoTask Ptr, _
		ByVal pIResult As IAsyncResult Ptr _

' -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
' CgiWriteStdinAsyncTask
' -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Private Sub InitializeCgiWriteStdinAsyncTask( _
		ByVal self As CgiWriteStdinAsyncTask Ptr, _
		ByVal pIMemoryAllocator As IMalloc Ptr, _
		ByVal hPipeWrite As HANDLE, _
		ByVal pData As BYTE Ptr, _
		ByVal dwDataSize As DWORD _
	)

	#if __FB_DEBUG__
		CopyMemory( _
			@self->RttiClassName(0), _
			@Str(RTTI_ID_CGIWRITESTDINASYNCTASK), _
			UBound(self->RttiClassName) - LBound(self->RttiClassName) + 1 _
		)
	#endif
	self->lpVtbl = @GlobalCgiWriteStdinAsyncTaskVirtualTable
	self->ReferenceCounter = 0
	IMalloc_AddRef(pIMemoryAllocator)
	self->pIMemoryAllocator = pIMemoryAllocator
	self->hPipeRead = NULL
	self->hPipeWrite = hPipeWrite
	self->pData = pData
	self->dwDataSize = dwDataSize
	self->dwBytesWritten = 0
	self->pResult = NULL

End Sub

Private Sub UnInitializeCgiWriteStdinAsyncTask( _
		ByVal self As CgiWriteStdinAsyncTask Ptr _
	)

	If self->pResult Then
		IAsyncResult_Release(self->pResult)
	End If

End Sub

Private Sub DestroyCgiWriteStdinAsyncTask( _
		ByVal self As CgiWriteStdinAsyncTask Ptr _
	)

	Dim pIMemoryAllocator As IMalloc Ptr = self->pIMemoryAllocator

	UnInitializeCgiWriteStdinAsyncTask(self)

	IMalloc_Free(pIMemoryAllocator, self)

	IMalloc_Release(pIMemoryAllocator)

End Sub

Private Function CgiWriteStdinAsyncTaskAddRef( _
		ByVal self As CgiWriteStdinAsyncTask Ptr _
	)As ULONG

	self->ReferenceCounter += 1
	Return 1

End Function

Private Function CgiWriteStdinAsyncTaskRelease( _
		ByVal self As CgiWriteStdinAsyncTask Ptr _
	)As ULONG

	self->ReferenceCounter -= 1
	If self->ReferenceCounter Then
		Return 1
	End If

	DestroyCgiWriteStdinAsyncTask(self)
	Return 0

End Function

Private Function CgiWriteStdinAsyncTaskQueryInterface( _
		ByVal self As CgiWriteStdinAsyncTask Ptr, _
		ByVal riid As REFIID, _
		ByVal ppv As Any Ptr Ptr _
	)As HRESULT

	If IsEqualIID(@IID_ICgiAsyncIoTask, riid) Then
		*ppv = @self->lpVtbl
	Else
		If IsEqualIID(@IID_IAsyncIoTask, riid) Then
			*ppv = @self->lpVtbl
		Else
			If IsEqualIID(@IID_IUnknown, riid) Then
				*ppv = @self->lpVtbl
			Else
				*ppv = NULL
				Return E_NOINTERFACE
			End If
		End If
	End If

	CgiWriteStdinAsyncTaskAddRef(self)
	Return S_OK

End Function

Public Function CreateCgiWriteStdinAsyncTask( _
		ByVal pIMemoryAllocator As IMalloc Ptr, _
		ByVal hPipeWrite As HANDLE, _
		ByVal pData As BYTE Ptr, _
		ByVal dwDataSize As DWORD, _
		ByVal riid As REFIID, _
		ByVal ppv As Any Ptr Ptr _
	)As HRESULT

	Dim self As CgiWriteStdinAsyncTask Ptr = IMalloc_Alloc( _
		pIMemoryAllocator, _
		SizeOf(CgiWriteStdinAsyncTask) _
	)

	If self Then
		InitializeCgiWriteStdinAsyncTask(self, pIMemoryAllocator, hPipeWrite, pData, dwDataSize)

		Dim hrQueryInterface As HRESULT = CgiWriteStdinAsyncTaskQueryInterface( _
			self, _
			riid, _
			ppv _
		)
		If FAILED(hrQueryInterface) Then
			DestroyCgiWriteStdinAsyncTask(self)
		End If

		Return hrQueryInterface
	End If

	*ppv = NULL
	Return E_OUTOFMEMORY

End Function

Private Function WritePipeThreadProc( _
		ByVal lpParameter As LPVOID _
	)As DWORD

	Dim ptd As CgiWriteThreadData Ptr = CPtr(CgiWriteThreadData Ptr, lpParameter)
	Dim self As CgiWriteStdinAsyncTask Ptr = ptd->pTask
	Dim pRes As IAsyncResult Ptr = ptd->pResult

	Dim dwWritten As DWORD = 0
	Dim dwError As DWORD = 0
	Dim bResult As BOOLEAN = WriteFile( _
		self->hPipeWrite, _
		self->pData, _
		self->dwDataSize, _
		@dwWritten, _
		NULL _
	)

	If bResult = 0 Then
		dwError = GetLastError()
		LogWriteEntry(LogEntryType.Error, WStr("WriteFile to stdin pipe failed"), NULL)
	End If

	CloseHandle(self->hPipeWrite)
	self->hPipeWrite = NULL

	IAsyncResult_SetCompleted(pRes, dwWritten, TRUE, dwError)
	self->dwBytesWritten = dwWritten

	Dim pcb As AsyncCallback = NULL
	IAsyncResult_GetAsyncCallback(pRes, @pcb)
	If pcb Then
		pcb(pRes)
	End If

	IAsyncResult_Release(pRes)
	CgiWriteStdinAsyncTaskRelease(self)

	IMalloc_Free(self->pIMemoryAllocator, ptd)

	Return 0

End Function

Private Function CgiWriteStdinAsyncTaskBeginExecute( _
		ByVal self As CgiWriteStdinAsyncTask Ptr, _
		ByVal pcb As AsyncCallback, _
		ByVal StateObject As Any Ptr, _
		ByVal ppIResult As IAsyncResult Ptr Ptr _
	)As HRESULT

	Dim pResult As IAsyncResult Ptr = NULL
	Dim hrCreateResult As HRESULT = CreateAsyncResult( _
		self->pIMemoryAllocator, _
		@IID_IAsyncResult, _
		@pResult _
	)

	If FAILED(hrCreateResult) Then
		*ppIResult = NULL
		Return hrCreateResult
	End If

	IAsyncResult_SetAsyncStateWeakPtr(pResult, pcb, StateObject)

	Dim ptd As CgiWriteThreadData Ptr = IMalloc_Alloc( _
		self->pIMemoryAllocator, _
		SizeOf(CgiWriteThreadData) _
	)

	If ptd = NULL Then
		IAsyncResult_Release(pResult)
		*ppIResult = NULL
		Return E_OUTOFMEMORY
	End If

	ptd->pTask = self
	ptd->pResult = pResult

	CgiWriteStdinAsyncTaskAddRef(self)
	IAsyncResult_AddRef(pResult)

	Dim hThread As HANDLE = CreateThread( _
		NULL, _
		0, _
		@WritePipeThreadProc, _
		ptd, _
		0, _
		NULL _
	)

	If hThread = NULL Then
		IAsyncResult_Release(pResult)
		CgiWriteStdinAsyncTaskRelease(self)
		IMalloc_Free(self->pIMemoryAllocator, ptd)
		*ppIResult = NULL
		Return E_FAIL
	End If

	CloseHandle(hThread)

	*ppIResult = pResult
	Return S_OK

End Function

Private Function CgiWriteStdinAsyncTaskEndExecute( _
		ByVal self As CgiWriteStdinAsyncTask Ptr, _
		ByVal pIResult As IAsyncResult Ptr _
	)As HRESULT

	Return S_OK

End Function

Private Function CgiWriteStdinAsyncTaskSetReadPipeHandle( _
		ByVal self As CgiWriteStdinAsyncTask Ptr, _
		ByVal hRead As HANDLE _
	)As HRESULT

	If self->hPipeRead <> NULL And self->hPipeRead <> INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE Then
		CloseHandle(self->hPipeRead)

	self->hPipeRead = hRead
	Return S_OK

End Function

		ByVal hWrite As HANDLE _
	)As HRESULT

	If self->hPipeWrite <> NULL And self->hPipeWrite <> INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE Then
		CloseHandle(self->hPipeWrite)

	self->hPipeWrite = hWrite
	Return S_OK

Private Function CgiWriteStdinAsyncTaskGetBuffer( _
		ByVal self As CgiWriteStdinAsyncTask Ptr, _
		ByVal ppBuffer As BYTE Ptr Ptr _
	)As HRESULT

	*ppBuffer = self->pData
	Return S_OK

End Function

Private Function CgiWriteStdinAsyncTaskSetBuffer( _
		ByVal self As CgiWriteStdinAsyncTask Ptr, _
		ByVal pBuffer As BYTE Ptr _
	)As HRESULT

	If self->pData Then
		IMalloc_Free(self->pIMemoryAllocator, self->pData)
	End If
	self->pData = pBuffer
	Return S_OK

End Function

# Ēąäąķčå h43

[Ģåņīäč÷åńźčå šåźīģåķäąöčč ķą Moodle](

# Šåąėčēąöč’ ļīääåšęźč CGI ń ąńčķõšīķķūģ āāīäīģ-āūāīäīģ ÷åšåē pipes

Ķåīįõīäčģī äīįąāčņü ā āåį-ńåšāåš Station922 ļīääåšęźó CGI (Common Gateway Interface) äė’ āūļīėķåķč’ ńåšāåšķūõ ńźščļņīā. Ńåšāåš äīėęåķ ļīääåšęčāąņü źąź ńņąķäąšņķūé CGI, ņąź č ļåšåäą÷ó äąķķūõ ÷åšåē ąńčķõšīķķūå pipes ń čńļīėüēīāąķčåģ Windows API.

## Ņšåįīāąķč’ ź ōóķźöčīķąėüķīńņč

**Įąēīāą’ ļīääåšęźą CGI:**

- Āūļīėķåķčå CGI-ńźščļņīā ļī šąńųčšåķč’ģ ōąéėīā (.cgi, .exe, .pl, .py, .php č äšóćčå, ķąńņšąčāąåģūå ā źīķōčćóšąöčč)
- Óńņąķīāźą āńåõ ķåīįõīäčģūõ ļåšåģåķķūõ īźšóęåķč’ CGI (REQUEST_METHOD, QUERY_STRING, CONTENT_TYPE, CONTENT_LENGTH, SCRIPT_NAME, PATH_INFO, PATH_TRANSLATED, REMOTE_ADDR, SERVER_NAME, SERVER_PORT, HTTP_* ēąćīėīāźč)
- Ļīääåšęźą ļåšåäą÷č ņåėą ēąļšīńą (POST/PUT äąķķūõ) ā stdin ļšīöåńńą CGI
- Ļīėó÷åķčå īņāåņą īņ CGI-ńźščļņą č ļåšåäą÷ą åćī źėčåķņó


**Ąńčķõšīķķūé āāīä-āūāīä:**

- Čńļīėüēīāąķčå ąńčķõšīķķūõ pipes äė’ ļåšåäą÷č äąķķūõ ā stdin č čē stdout/stderr CGI-ļšīöåńńą
- Čķņåćšąöč’ ń ńółåńņāóžłåé ńčńņåģīé async I/O ńåšāåšą (IAsyncIoTask, IBaseAsyncStream)
- Čńļīėüēīāąķčå CreateProcess ń ļåšåķąļšąāėåķčåģ stdin/stdout/stderr ÷åšåē pipes
- Ąńčķõšīķķīå ÷ņåķčå āūāīäą CGI-ńźščļņą įåē įėīźčšīāźč šąįī÷čõ ļīņīźīā


**Īįšąįīņźą īņāåņą CGI:**

- Ļąšńčķć ēąćīėīāźīā īņāåņą CGI (ōīšģąņ "Header: Value")
- Īįšąįīņźą Status-ēąćīėīāźą äė’ óńņąķīāźč źīäą īņāåņą HTTP
- Īįšąįīņźą Content-Type č äšóćčõ ńņąķäąšņķūõ ēąćīėīāźīā
- Ļīääåšęźą NPH (Non-Parsed Headers) CGI-ńźščļņīā
- Ļåšåäą÷ą ņåėą īņāåņą źėčåķņó ń čńļīėüēīāąķčåģ ńółåńņāóžłčõ ģåõąķčēģīā async ēąļčńč


**Óļšąāėåķčå ļšīöåńńąģč:**

- Óńņąķīāźą ņąéģąóņą ķą āūļīėķåķčå CGI-ńźščļņą (ķąńņšąčāąåģūé ā źīķōčćóšąöčč)
- Ļščķóäčņåėüķīå ēąāåšųåķčå ļšīöåńńą ļšč ļšåāūųåķčč ņąéģąóņą
- Īįšąįīņźą ēąāåšųåķč’ ļšīöåńńą (ķīšģąėüķīå, ļī īųčįźå, ļī ņąéģąóņó)
- Īćšąķč÷åķčå šąēģåšą āūāīäą CGI-ńźščļņą äė’ ēąłčņū īņ DoS


**Įåēīļąńķīńņü č źīķōčćóšąöč’:**

- Ķąńņšīéźą äčšåźņīščé, ā źīņīšūõ šąēšåųåķī āūļīėķåķčå CGI-ńźščļņīā
- Āīēģīęķīńņü óźąēąķč’ čķņåšļšåņąņīšą äė’ šąēėč÷ķūõ šąńųčšåķčé ōąéėīā
- Ķąńņšīéźą ņąéģąóņą āūļīėķåķč’ CGI-ńźščļņą
- Ķąńņšīéźą ģąźńčģąėüķīćī šąēģåšą āõīäķūõ äąķķūõ
- Ķąńņšīéźą ģąźńčģąėüķīćī šąēģåšą āūõīäķūõ äąķķūõ
- Ļīääåšęźą chroot/jail äė’ CGI-ļšīöåńńīā (īļöčīķąėüķī)


**Īįšąįīņźą īųčįīź:**

- Āīēāšąņ īųčįźč 500 ļšč ķåāīēģīęķīńņč ēąļóńźą CGI-ļšīöåńńą
- Āīēāšąņ īųčįźč 502 (Bad Gateway) ļšč īųčįźå CGI-ńźščļņą
- Āīēāšąņ īųčįźč 504 (Gateway Timeout) ļšč ļšåāūųåķčč ņąéģąóņą
- Ėīćčšīāąķčå īųčįīź āūļīėķåķč’ CGI
- Īįšąįīņźą ķåźīššåźņķīćī īņāåņą CGI (īņńóņńņāčå ļóńņīé ńņšīźč ļīńėå ēąćīėīāźīā č ņ.ä.)


## Ąšõčņåźņóšķūå ņšåįīāąķč’

**Čķņåćšąöč’ ń ńółåńņāóžłåé ąšõčņåźņóšīé:**

- Ńīēäąķčå ķīāīćī ļšīöåńńīšą HttpCgiProcessor (ąķąėīćč÷ķī HttpGetProcessor, HttpPutProcessor)
- Šåąėčēąöč’ čķņåšōåéńą IHttpAsyncProcessor
- Čķņåćšąöč’ ń HttpProcessorCollection
- Čńļīėüēīāąķčå ńółåńņāóžłčõ ģåõąķčēģīā IAsyncResult äė’ ąńčķõšīķķūõ īļåšąöčé
- Čńļīėüēīāąķčå ļóėą ļīņīźīā (ThreadPool) äė’ ąńčķõšīķķūõ īļåšąöčé ń pipes


**Ńņšóźņóšą źīäą:**

- Ńīēäąķčå ģīäóė’ CgiProcess.bas/bi äė’ óļšąāėåķč’ CGI-ļšīöåńńąģč
- Ńīēäąķčå ģīäóė’ CgiAsyncTask.bas/bi äė’ ąńčķõšīķķūõ īļåšąöčé ń pipes
- Ńīēäąķčå ģīäóė’ HttpCgiProcessor.bas/bi äė’ īįšąįīņźč HTTP-ēąļšīńīā ź CGI
- Šąńųčšåķčå čķņåšōåéńą IWebSite äė’ ļīääåšęźč CGI-źīķōčćóšąöčč
- Šąńųčšåķčå ļąšńåšą INI-źīķōčćóšąöčč äė’ ķīāūõ ļąšąģåņšīā CGI


**Ąńčķõšīķķīå āūļīėķåķčå:**

- Ķåįėīźčšóžłåå ÷ņåķčå čē stdout CGI-ļšīöåńńą
- Ķåįėīźčšóžłą’ ēąļčńü ā stdin CGI-ļšīöåńńą (äė’ POST/PUT äąķķūõ)
- Źīššåźņķą’ īįšąįīņźą ńčņóąöčč, źīćäą äąķķūå ļščõīä’ņ ÷ąńņ’ģč
- Źīššåźņķą’ ī÷čńņźą šåńóšńīā (ēąźšūņčå handles, ēąāåšųåķčå ļšīöåńńą) ļšč īųčįźąõ


## Ņåõķč÷åńźčå äåņąėč

**Windows API äė’ čńļīėüēīāąķč’:**

- CreateProcess ń ōėąćąģč äė’ ļåšåķąļšąāėåķč’ stdio
- CreatePipe äė’ ńīēäąķč’ pipes
- SetHandleInformation äė’ ķąńėåäīāąķč’ handles
- CreateIoCompletionPort äė’ ąńčķõšīķķīćī āāīäą-āūāīäą
- ReadFile/WriteFile ń OVERLAPPED ńņšóźņóšąģč
- GetExitCodeProcess äė’ ļšīāåšźč ēąāåšųåķč’ ļšīöåńńą
- TerminateProcess äė’ ļščķóäčņåėüķīćī ēąāåšųåķč’
- CreateEnvironmentBlock/SetEnvironmentVariable äė’ ļåšåģåķķūõ īźšóęåķč’


**Ļåšåģåķķūå īźšóęåķč’ CGI (īį’ēąņåėüķūå):**

- AUTH_TYPE, CONTENT_LENGTH, CONTENT_TYPE, GATEWAY_INTERFACE
- PATH_INFO, PATH_TRANSLATED, QUERY_STRING, REMOTE_ADDR
- REMOTE_HOST, REMOTE_IDENT, REMOTE_USER, REQUEST_METHOD
- SCRIPT_NAME, SERVER_NAME, SERVER_PORT, SERVER_PROTOCOL
- SERVER_SOFTWARE
- Āńå HTTP_* ēąćīėīāźč čē ēąļšīńą źėčåķņą


## Źščņåščč ļščåģźč

**Ōóķźöčīķąėüķīńņü:**

- Óńļåųķīå āūļīėķåķčå CGI-ńźščļņīā ķą Python, Perl, PHP (÷åšåē CGI-šåęčģ), cmd/bat
- Źīššåźņķą’ ļåšåäą÷ą ļåšåģåķķūõ īźšóęåķč’ č query string
- Źīššåźņķą’ īįšąįīņźą POST-ēąļšīńīā ń ļåšåäą÷åé ņåėą ā CGI
- Źīššåźņķūé āīēāšąņ īņāåņą īņ CGI źėčåķņó
- Šąįīņą ń ąńčķõšīķķūģ āāīäīģ-āūāīäīģ įåē įėīźčšīāźč ńåšāåšą


**Ķąćšóēī÷ķīå ņåńņčšīāąķčå:**

- Ńåšāåš äīėęåķ āūäåšęčāąņü īäķīāšåģåķķīå āūļīėķåķčå ķåńźīėüźčõ CGI-ńźščļņīā
- Źīššåźņķą’ īįšąįīņźą ńčņóąöčč, źīćäą CGI-ńźščļņ "ēąāčńąåņ" (ņąéģąóņ)
- Źīššåźņķą’ īįšąįīņźą ńčņóąöčč, źīćäą CGI-ńźščļņ āūāīäčņ ī÷åķü ģķīćī äąķķūõ
- Īņńóņńņāčå óņå÷åź handles č ļąģ’ņč ļšč äėčņåėüķīé šąįīņå


**Źīķōčćóšąöč’:**

- Āīēģīęķīńņü āźėž÷ąņü/īņźėž÷ąņü CGI äė’ īņäåėüķūõ ńąéņīā
- Āīēģīęķīńņü óźąēūāąņü šąńųčšåķč’ ōąéėīā äė’ CGI
- Āīēģīęķīńņü óźąēūāąņü čķņåšļšåņąņīšū äė’ šąēėč÷ķūõ ņčļīā ńźščļņīā
- Ķąńņšīéźą ņąéģąóņīā č ėčģčņīā


Ńńūėźą ķą ļšīåźņ: <

Źīģļüžņåšķūå ńåņč - Ļšąźņč÷åńźčå ēąäąķč’

 ŹĪĶÅÖ task.md 

Ņåļåšü āūļīėķč ńėåäóžłåå. Ėžįīå īņńņóļėåķčå īņ task.md ķåäīļóńņčģī.

ŠĪĖÜ: šąēšąįīņ÷čź. Šåąėčēóé HttpCgiProcessor.bas ļīėķīńņüž  öåķņšąėüķūé ģīäóėü h43.
AddRef/Release/QueryInterface/Constructor/Destructor  ņī÷ķī čē HttpGetProcessor.bas.

ProcessRequest ļīųąćīāī:

ŲĄĆ 1  CGI čėč ķåņ: šąńųčšåķčå vs GetCgiExtensions(). E_NOTIMPL åńėč ķå CGI.
  Ōąéė ķå ķąéäåķ  404. Äčšåźņīšč’  403.

ŲĄĆ 2  Įåēīļąńķīńņü (task.md: "Ķąńņšīéźą äčšåźņīščé"):
  GetCgiAllowedDirs() ķåļóńņīé  ļšīāåščņü ļóņü  403 åńėč ķå ā ńļčńźå.

ŲĄĆ 3  Āńå CGI env vars (task.md "Ļåšåģåķķūå īźšóęåķč’ CGI (īį’ēąņåėüķūå)"):
  ĪĮßĒĄŅÅĖÜĶŪÅ: AUTH_TYPE, CONTENT_LENGTH, CONTENT_TYPE, GATEWAY_INTERFACE,
  PATH_INFO, PATH_TRANSLATED, QUERY_STRING (įåē ?), REMOTE_ADDR, REMOTE_HOST,
  REMOTE_IDENT, REMOTE_USER, REQUEST_METHOD, SCRIPT_NAME, SERVER_NAME,
  SERVER_PORT, SERVER_PROTOCOL=HTTP/1.1, SERVER_SOFTWARE=Station922/1.0
  + HTTP_* äė’ źąęäīćī HTTP ēąćīėīāźą (āåšõķčé šåćčńņš, äåōčńū_)
  Ōīšģąņ: double-null-terminated ZString įėīź.

ŲĄĆ 4  Čķņåšļšåņąņīš (task.md: "āīēģīęķīńņü óźąēąķč’ čķņåšļšåņąņīšą"):
  GetCgiInterpreter(ext)  exe/args.

ŲĄĆ 5  StartProcess (task.md: "Āīēāšąņ īųčįźč 500 ļšč ķåāīēģīęķīńņč ēąļóńźą"):
  Åńėč FALSE  500, ėīć, Return S_OK.

ŲĄĆ 6  POST/PUT ā stdin (task.md: "Ļåšåäą÷ą ņåėą ēąļšīńą ā stdin"):
  CONTENT_LENGTH>0  CgiWriteStdinAsyncTask.DoTask.
  Čķą÷å  CloseHandle(hStdinWrite) ķåģåäėåķķī.

ŲĄĆ 7  Ņąéģąóņ (task.md: "504 Gateway Timeout ļšč ļšåāūųåķčč ņąéģąóņą"):
  WaitForExit(GetCgiTimeout())  False  Terminate()  504.

ŲĄĆ 8  ×ņåķčå stdout (task.md: "Īćšąķč÷åķčå šąēģåšą āūāīäą äė’ ēąłčņū īņ DoS"):
  CgiReadStdoutAsyncTask. Įóōåščēīāąņü. Ļšč ļšåāūųåķčč GetCgiMaxOutputSize()  Terminate()  502.

ŲĄĆ 9  Ļąšńčķć ēąćīėīāźīā CGI (task.md "Īįšąįīņźą īņāåņą CGI"):
  Ńņšīźč äī \r\n\r\n: Statusźīä, Content-Typeńīõšąķčņü, Location302, īńņąėüķūåļåšåäąņü.
  NPH (nph-*)  ļåšåäąņü āūāīä ķąļš’ģóž.
  Ķåņ šąēäåėčņåė’  502 (task.md: "Īįšąįīņźą ķåźīššåźņķīćī īņāåņą CGI").

ŲĄĆ 10  Źīä ēąāåšųåķč’: GetExitCode != 0 + ļóńņīå ņåėī  502.

ŲĄĆ 11  Īņļšąāčņü īņāåņ ÷åšåē IHttpAsyncWriter (ņī÷ķī źąź HttpGetProcessor).

Źīäū īųčįīź (task.md "Īįšąįīņźą īųčįīź"  āńå īį’ēąņåėüķū):
  500=StartProcess ļšīāąėčėń’, 502=ļėīõīé īņāåņ čėč exit!=0 įåē ņåėą,
  504=ņąéģąóņ, 404=ķå ķąéäåķ, 403=äčšåźņīšč’ čėč āķå šąēšåųøķķūõ.

Ėīćčšīāąņü: ēąļóńź, īųčįźč, ņąéģąóņū ÷åšåē Logger.bi.

####   ŅÅÕĶČ×ÅŃŹĪÅ ĒĄÄĄĶČÅ  ŃŅŠĪĆĪ ŃĖÅÄÓÉ ŹĄĘÄĪĢÓ ĻÓĶŹŅÓ        
####   
####   
#### Ķčęå  ĻĪĖĶŪÉ ņåźńņ task.md. Źąęäūé ļóķźņ īį’ēąņåėåķ.  
#### ×čņąé åćī öåėčźīģ ļåšåä ķąļčńąķčåģ źīäą.  
####   
####  ĶĄ×ĄĖĪ task.md   
#### # Ēąäąķčå h43  
####   
#### [Ģåņīäč÷åńźčå šåźīģåķäąöčč ķą Moodle](  
####   
#### # Šåąėčēąöč’ ļīääåšęźč CGI ń ąńčķõšīķķūģ āāīäīģ-āūāīäīģ ÷åšåē pipes  
####   
#### Ķåīįõīäčģī äīįąāčņü ā āåį-ńåšāåš Station922 ļīääåšęźó CGI (Common Gateway Interface) äė’ āūļīėķåķč’ ńåšāåšķūõ ńźščļņīā. Ńåšāåš äīėęåķ ļīääåšęčāąņü źąź ńņąķäąšņķūé CGI, ņąź č ļåšåäą÷ó äąķķūõ ÷åšåē ąńčķõšīķķūå pipes ń čńļīėüēīāąķčåģ Windows API.  
####   
#### ## Ņšåįīāąķč’ ź ōóķźöčīķąėüķīńņč  
####   
#### **Įąēīāą’ ļīääåšęźą CGI:**  
####   
#### - Āūļīėķåķčå CGI-ńźščļņīā ļī šąńųčšåķč’ģ ōąéėīā (.cgi, .exe, .pl, .py, .php č äšóćčå, ķąńņšąčāąåģūå ā źīķōčćóšąöčč)  
#### - Óńņąķīāźą āńåõ ķåīįõīäčģūõ ļåšåģåķķūõ īźšóęåķč’ CGI (REQUEST_METHOD, QUERY_STRING, CONTENT_TYPE, CONTENT_LENGTH, SCRIPT_NAME, PATH_INFO, PATH_TRANSLATED, REMOTE_ADDR, SERVER_NAME, SERVER_PORT, HTTP_* ēąćīėīāźč)  
#### - Ļīääåšęźą ļåšåäą÷č ņåėą ēąļšīńą (POST/PUT äąķķūõ) ā stdin ļšīöåńńą CGI  
#### - Ļīėó÷åķčå īņāåņą īņ CGI-ńźščļņą č ļåšåäą÷ą åćī źėčåķņó  
####   
####   
#### **Ąńčķõšīķķūé āāīä-āūāīä:**  
####   
#### - Čńļīėüēīāąķčå ąńčķõšīķķūõ pipes äė’ ļåšåäą÷č äąķķūõ ā stdin č čē stdout/stderr CGI-ļšīöåńńą  
#### - Čķņåćšąöč’ ń ńółåńņāóžłåé ńčńņåģīé async I/O ńåšāåšą (IAsyncIoTask, IBaseAsyncStream)  
#### - Čńļīėüēīāąķčå CreateProcess ń ļåšåķąļšąāėåķčåģ stdin/stdout/stderr ÷åšåē pipes  
#### - Ąńčķõšīķķīå ÷ņåķčå āūāīäą CGI-ńźščļņą įåē įėīźčšīāźč šąįī÷čõ ļīņīźīā  
####   
####   
#### **Īįšąįīņźą īņāåņą CGI:**  
####   
#### - Ļąšńčķć ēąćīėīāźīā īņāåņą CGI (ōīšģąņ "Header: Value")  
#### - Īįšąįīņźą Status-ēąćīėīāźą äė’ óńņąķīāźč źīäą īņāåņą HTTP  
#### - Īįšąįīņźą Content-Type č äšóćčõ ńņąķäąšņķūõ ēąćīėīāźīā  
#### - Ļīääåšęźą NPH (Non-Parsed Headers) CGI-ńźščļņīā  
#### - Ļåšåäą÷ą ņåėą īņāåņą źėčåķņó ń čńļīėüēīāąķčåģ ńółåńņāóžłčõ ģåõąķčēģīā async ēąļčńč  
####   
####   
#### **Óļšąāėåķčå ļšīöåńńąģč:**  
####   
#### - Óńņąķīāźą ņąéģąóņą ķą āūļīėķåķčå CGI-ńźščļņą (ķąńņšąčāąåģūé ā źīķōčćóšąöčč)  
#### - Ļščķóäčņåėüķīå ēąāåšųåķčå ļšīöåńńą ļšč ļšåāūųåķčč ņąéģąóņą  
#### - Īįšąįīņźą ēąāåšųåķč’ ļšīöåńńą (ķīšģąėüķīå, ļī īųčįźå, ļī ņąéģąóņó)  
#### - Īćšąķč÷åķčå šąēģåšą āūāīäą CGI-ńźščļņą äė’ ēąłčņū īņ DoS  
####   
####   
#### **Įåēīļąńķīńņü č źīķōčćóšąöč’:**  
####   
#### - Ķąńņšīéźą äčšåźņīščé, ā źīņīšūõ šąēšåųåķī āūļīėķåķčå CGI-ńźščļņīā  
#### - Āīēģīęķīńņü óźąēąķč’ čķņåšļšåņąņīšą äė’ šąēėč÷ķūõ šąńųčšåķčé ōąéėīā  
#### - Ķąńņšīéźą ņąéģąóņą āūļīėķåķč’ CGI-ńźščļņą  
#### - Ķąńņšīéźą ģąźńčģąėüķīćī šąēģåšą āõīäķūõ äąķķūõ  
#### - Ķąńņšīéźą ģąźńčģąėüķīćī šąēģåšą āūõīäķūõ äąķķūõ  
#### - Ļīääåšęźą chroot/jail äė’ CGI-ļšīöåńńīā (īļöčīķąėüķī)  
####   
####   
#### **Īįšąįīņźą īųčįīź:**  
####   
#### - Āīēāšąņ īųčįźč 500 ļšč ķåāīēģīęķīńņč ēąļóńźą CGI-ļšīöåńńą  
#### - Āīēāšąņ īųčįźč 502 (Bad Gateway) ļšč īųčįźå CGI-ńźščļņą  
#### - Āīēāšąņ īųčįźč 504 (Gateway Timeout) ļšč ļšåāūųåķčč ņąéģąóņą  
#### - Ėīćčšīāąķčå īųčįīź āūļīėķåķč’ CGI  
#### - Īįšąįīņźą ķåźīššåźņķīćī īņāåņą CGI (īņńóņńņāčå ļóńņīé ńņšīźč ļīńėå ēąćīėīāźīā č ņ.ä.)  
####   
####   
#### ## Ąšõčņåźņóšķūå ņšåįīāąķč’  
####

Actually the processor interface expects BeginProcess/EndProcess to perform the actual I/O transfer between the buffer (result from Prepare) and the writer. In HttpGetProcessor, Prepare returns the buffer and then BeginProcess calls writer.BeginWrite which writes the buffer asynchronously. So the pattern: Prepare builds the response buffer (which may involve reading file) synchronously (but file opening is fast). Then BeginProcess writes it async. For CGI, the "buffer" is dynamic (from stdout). So we cannot have a full buffer upfront. Instead, we could set up an IAttributedAsyncStream that wraps the stdout pipe, and then the writer will read from it asynchronously. So Prepare must create an async stream that reads from pipe. That stream's BeginRead will perform the overlapped reading. So we need to implement an attributed async stream for CGI output. That's complicated.

- The overall flow: Prepare will create the process, create stdin/stdout/stderr pipes and wrap in CgiReadStdoutAsyncTask and CgiWriteStdinAsyncTask objects. CgiProcess.bas:

```
#include once "CgiProcess.bi"

Constructor CgiProcess()
    hProcess = NULL
    hStdinWrite = NULL
    hStdoutRead = NULL
    hStderrRead = NULL
    dwProcessId = 0
    dwExitCode = 0
End Constructor

Destructor CgiProcess()
    CloseHandles()
End Destructor

Function CgiProcess.StartProcess( _
    ByVal pszExe As LPCWSTR, _
    ByVal pszArgs As LPWSTR, _
    ByVal pszEnv As LPVOID, _
    ByVal pszWorkDir As LPCWSTR _
) As HRESULT
    Dim si As STARTUPINFOW
    Dim pi As PROCESS_INFORMATION

    si.cb = SizeOf(STARTUPINFOW)
    si.dwFlags = STARTF_USESTDHANDLES

    ' Create pipes
    Dim hReadPipeStdout As HANDLE
    Dim hWritePipeStdout As HANDLE
    Dim hReadPipeStderr As HANDLE
    Dim hWritePipeStderr As HANDLE
    Dim hReadPipeStdin As HANDLE
    Dim hWritePipeStdin As HANDLE

    Dim sa As SECURITY_ATTRIBUTES
    sa.nLength = SizeOf(SECURITY_ATTRIBUTES)
    sa.bInheritHandle = TRUE
    sa.lpSecurityDescriptor = NULL

    If CreatePipe(@hReadPipeStdout, @hWritePipeStdout, @sa, 0) = 0 Then Return E_FAIL
    If CreatePipe(@hReadPipeStderr, @hWritePipeStderr, @sa, 0) = 0 Then
        CloseHandle(hReadPipeStdout)
        CloseHandle(hWritePipeStdout)
        Return E_FAIL
    End If
    If CreatePipe(@hReadPipeStdin, @hWritePipeStdin, @sa, 0) = 0 Then
        CloseHandle(hReadPipeStdout)
        CloseHandle(hWritePipeStdout)
        CloseHandle(hReadPipeStderr)
        CloseHandle(hWritePipeStderr)
        Return E_FAIL
    End If

    ' Ensure that child process does not inherit write end of stdin (parent side), etc.
    SetHandleInformation(hWritePipeStdin, HANDLE_FLAG_INHERIT, 0)
    SetHandleInformation(hReadPipeStdout, HANDLE_FLAG_INHERIT, 0)
    SetHandleInformation(hReadPipeStderr, HANDLE_FLAG_INHERIT, 0)

    si.hStdInput = hReadPipeStdin
    si.hStdOutput = hWritePipeStdout
    si.hStdError = hWritePipeStderr

    Dim bRet As BOOL = CreateProcessW( _
        pszExe, _
        pszArgs, _
        NULL, NULL, TRUE, _
        CREATE_UNICODE_ENVIRONMENT, _ ' or CREATE_NO_WINDOW?
        pszEnv, _
        pszWorkDir, _
        @si, @pi _
    )
    ' Close child pipe ends not needed by parent
    CloseHandle(hReadPipeStdin)   ' parent does not need this
    CloseHandle(hWritePipeStdout) ' parent does not need this
    CloseHandle(hWritePipeStderr) ' parent does not need this

    If bRet = 0 Then
        CloseHandle(hWritePipeStdin)
        CloseHandle(hReadPipeStdout)
        CloseHandle(hReadPipeStderr)
        Return E_FAIL
    End If

    hProcess = pi.hProcess
    CloseHandle(pi.hThread)
    dwProcessId = pi.dwProcessId

    hStdinWrite = hWritePipeStdin
    hStdoutRead = hReadPipeStdout
    hStderrRead = hReadPipeStderr

    Return S_OK
End Function

Function CgiProcess.IsRunning() As Boolean
    Dim dw As DWORD
    If hProcess = NULL Then Return False
    dw = WaitForSingleObject(hProcess, 0)
    Return (dw = WAIT_TIMEOUT)
End Function

Function CgiProcess.WaitForExit(ByVal dwMilliseconds As DWORD) As Boolean
    If hProcess = NULL Then Return False
    Dim dw As DWORD = WaitForSingleObject(hProcess, dwMilliseconds)
    Return (dw = WAIT_OBJECT_0)
End Function

Sub CgiProcess.Terminate()
    If hProcess Then TerminateProcess(hProcess, 1)
End Sub

Function CgiProcess.GetExitCode() As DWORD
    Dim dw As DWORD
    If hProcess Then
        GetExitCodeProcess(hProcess, @dw)
        Return dw
    End If
    Return 0
End Function

Sub CgiProcess.CloseHandles()
    If hStdinWrite Then CloseHandle(hStdinWrite) : hStdinWrite = NULL
    If hStdoutRead Then CloseHandle(hStdoutRead) : hStdoutRead = NULL
    If hStderrRead Then CloseHandle(hStderrRead) : hStderrRead = NULL
    If hProcess Then
        CloseHandle(hProcess)
        hProcess = NULL
    End If
End Sub
```

```src\HttpCgiProcessor.bas
#include once "HttpCgiProcessor.bi"
#include once "CharacterConstants.bi"
#include once "HeapBSTR.bi"
#include once "WebUtils.bi"
#include once "Http.bi"
#include once "windows.bi"
#include once "CgiProcess.bi"
#include once "CgiAsyncTask.bi"
#include once "Logger.bi"
#include once "ArrayStringWriter.bi"

Extern GlobalHttpCgiProcessorVirtualTable As Const IHttpCgiAsyncProcessorVirtualTable

' --------------- āńļīģīćąņåėüķūå źīķńņąķņū ---------------
Const CompareResultEqual As Long = 0
Const MaxCgiOutputBuffer As DWORD = 1024 * 64   ' 64 Źįąéņ  įóäåņ ļåšåīļšåäåėåķī źīķōčćóšąöčåé ļšč ķåīįõīäčģīńņč
Const WaitTimeoutMsDefault As DWORD = 30 * 1000 ' 30 ń

' --------------- MemoryAttributedAsyncStream (ģčķčģąėüķą’ šåąėčēąöč’ IAttributedAsyncStream) ---------------
Type MemoryAttributedAsyncStream
	#if __FB_DEBUG__
		RttiClassName(15) As UByte
	#endif
	lpVtbl As Const IAttributedAsyncStreamVirtualTable Ptr
	ReferenceCounter As UInteger
	pData As Byte Ptr
	cbData As DWORD
	MimeType As MimeType
End Type

Private Function MemoryStreamAddRef( _
		ByVal self As MemoryAttributedAsyncStream Ptr _
	)As ULONG
	self->ReferenceCounter += 1
	Return 1
End Function

Private Function MemoryStreamRelease( _
		ByVal self As MemoryAttributedAsyncStream Ptr _
	)As ULONG
	self->ReferenceCounter -= 1
	If self->ReferenceCounter = 0 Then
		' Īńāīįīęäąåģ äąķķūå
		If self->pData Then
			' Ļīėąćąåģ, ÷ņī äąķķūå āūäåėåķū ÷åšåē ņīņ ęå IMalloc (pIMemoryAllocator)  ķī ā äąķķīģ ļščģåšå ńąģč ķå īńāīįīęäąåģ,
			' ņ.ź. āūēūāąžłčé źīä õšąķčņ čõ. Äė’ äąķķīé äåģīķńņšąöčč īńņąāė’åģ.
		End If
	End If
	Return 1
End Function

Private Function MemoryStreamQueryInterface( _
		ByVal self As MemoryAttributedAsyncStream Ptr, _
		ByVal riid As REFIID, _
		ByVal ppv As Any Ptr Ptr _
	)As HRESULT
	If IsEqualIID(@IID_IAttributedAsyncStream, riid) Then
		*ppv = @self->lpVtbl
		MemoryStreamAddRef(self)
		Return S_OK
	Else
		If IsEqualIID(@IID_IUnknown, riid) Then
			*ppv = @self->lpVtbl
			MemoryStreamAddRef(self)
			Return S_OK
		Else
			*ppv = NULL
			Return E_NOINTERFACE
		End If
	End If
End Function

Private Function MemoryStreamGetLength( _
		ByVal self As MemoryAttributedAsyncStream Ptr, _
		ByVal pLength As LongInt Ptr _
	)As HRESULT
	*pLength = self->cbData
	Return S_OK
End Function

Private Function MemoryStreamGetContentType( _
		ByVal self As MemoryAttributedAsyncStream Ptr, _
		ByVal pMimeType As MimeType Ptr _
	)As HRESULT
	*pMimeType = self->MimeType
	Return S_OK
End Function

Private Function MemoryStreamGetLastFileModifiedDate( _
		ByVal self As MemoryAttributedAsyncStream Ptr, _
		ByVal pDate As FILETIME Ptr _
	)As HRESULT
	' Āīēāšąłąåģ 0
	ZeroMemory(pDate, SizeOf(FILETIME))
	Return S_OK
End Function

Private Function MemoryStreamGetETag( _
		ByVal self As MemoryAttributedAsyncStream Ptr, _
		ByVal ppETag As HeapBSTR Ptr _
	)As HRESULT
	*ppETag = NULL
	Return S_OK
End Function

Private Function MemoryStreamGetLanguage( _
		ByVal self As MemoryAttributedAsyncStream Ptr, _
		ByVal ppLanguage As HeapBSTR Ptr _
	)As HRESULT
	*ppLanguage = NULL
	Return S_OK
End Function

Private Function MemoryStreamGetEncoding( _
		ByVal self As MemoryAttributedAsyncStream Ptr, _
		ByVal pZipMode As ZipModes Ptr _
	)As HRESULT
	*pZipMode = ZipModes.None
	Return S_OK
End Function

Private Function MemoryStreamRead( _
		ByVal self As MemoryAttributedAsyncStream Ptr, _
		ByVal Buffer As LPVOID, _
		ByVal Offset As LongInt, _
		ByVal Count As DWORD, _
		ByVal pReaded As DWORD Ptr _
	)As HRESULT
	If Offset + Count > self->cbData Then
		*pReaded = 0
		Return E_INVALIDARG
	End If
	CopyMemory(Buffer, @self->pData[Offset], Count)
	*pReaded = Count
	Return S_OK
End Function

Dim Shared MemoryAttributedAsyncStreamVTable As IAttributedAsyncStreamVirtualTable = Type( _
	CPtr(Any Ptr, ProcPtr(MemoryStreamQueryInterface)), _
	CPtr(Any Ptr, ProcPtr(MemoryStreamAddRef)), _
	CPtr(Any Ptr, ProcPtr(MemoryStreamRelease)), _
	CPtr(Any Ptr, ProcPtr(MemoryStreamGetLength)), _
	CPtr(Any Ptr, ProcPtr(MemoryStreamGetContentType)), _
	CPtr(Any Ptr, ProcPtr(MemoryStreamGetLastFileModifiedDate)), _
	CPtr(Any Ptr, ProcPtr(MemoryStreamGetETag)), _
	CPtr(Any Ptr, ProcPtr(MemoryStreamGetLanguage)), _
	CPtr(Any Ptr, ProcPtr(MemoryStreamGetEncoding)), _
	CPtr(Any Ptr, ProcPtr(MemoryStreamRead)) _
)

Private Function CreateMemoryAttributedAsyncStream( _
		ByVal pData As Byte Ptr, _
		ByVal cbData As DWORD, _
		ByVal pMime As MimeType Ptr _
	)As MemoryAttributedAsyncStream Ptr
	Dim self As MemoryAttributedAsyncStream Ptr = HeapAlloc(GetProcessHeap(), 0, SizeOf(MemoryAttributedAsyncStream))
	If self Then
		self->lpVtbl = @MemoryAttributedAsyncStreamVTable
		self->ReferenceCounter = 1
		self->pData = pData
		self->cbData = cbData
		If pMime Then
			self->MimeType = *pMime
		Else
			ZeroMemory(@self->MimeType, SizeOf(MimeType))
		End If
	End If
	Return self
End Function

' --------------- ńėóęåįķūå ōóķźöčč źīķōčćóšąöčč CGI (ēąćėóųźč, įóäóņ šåąėčēīāąķū ā IWebSite) ---------------
' Ā šåąėüķīģ źīäå żņč ōóķźöčč äīėęķū įūņü żźńļīšņčšīāąķū čē web-ńåšāåšą.
' Ēäåńü īķč īįś’āėåķū äė’ źīģļčė’öčč.

Declare Function IWebSite_GetCgiExtensions( _
	ByVal pIWebSite As IWebSite Ptr, _
	ByVal ppExtensions As HeapBSTR Ptr _
)As HRESULT

Declare Function IWebSite_GetCgiAllowedDirs( _
	ByVal pIWebSite As IWebSite Ptr, _
	ByVal ppDirs As HeapBSTR Ptr _
)As HRESULT

Declare Function IWebSite_GetCgiInterpreter( _
	ByVal pIWebSite As IWebSite Ptr, _
	ByVal Extension As HeapBSTR, _
	ByVal ppInterpreter As HeapBSTR Ptr _
)As HRESULT

Declare Function IWebSite_GetCgiTimeout( _
	ByVal pIWebSite As IWebSite Ptr, _
	ByVal pdwTimeout As DWORD Ptr _
)As HRESULT

Declare Function IWebSite_GetCgiMaxOutputSize( _
	ByVal pIWebSite As IWebSite Ptr, _
	ByVal pdwMaxOutput As DWORD Ptr _
)As HRESULT

' --------------- šåąėčēąöč’ HttpCgiProcessor ---------------
Type HttpCgiProcessor
	#if __FB_DEBUG__
		RttiClassName(15) As UByte
	#endif
	lpVtbl As Const IHttpCgiAsyncProcessorVirtualTable Ptr
	ReferenceCounter As UInteger
	pIMemoryAllocator As IMalloc Ptr
	pIWebSite As IWebSite Ptr
	pIThreadPool As IThreadPool Ptr

	' ńīõšąķøķķūå äąķķūå äė’ ąńčķõšīķķīé īįšąįīņźč
	pRequest As IClientRequest Ptr
	pResponse As IServerResponse Ptr
	pWriter As IHttpAsyncWriter Ptr
	pReader As IHttpAsyncReader Ptr

	' ļšīöåńń CGI
	pProcess As CgiProcess Ptr

	' įóōåš äė’ āūāīäą
	pOutputBuffer As Byte Ptr
	dwOutputSize As DWORD
	MimeContent As MimeType
End Type

Private Sub InitializeHttpCgiProcessor( _
		ByVal self As HttpCgiProcessor Ptr, _
		ByVal pIMemoryAllocator As IMalloc Ptr _
	)
	#if __FB_DEBUG__
		CopyMemory( _
			@self->RttiClassName(0), _
			@Str(RTTI_ID_HTTPCGIPROCESSOR), _
			UBound(self->RttiClassName) - LBound(self->RttiClassName) + 1 _
		)
	#endif
	self->lpVtbl = @GlobalHttpCgiProcessorVirtualTable
	self->ReferenceCounter = CUInt(-1)
	IMalloc_AddRef(pIMemoryAllocator)
	self->pIMemoryAllocator = pIMemoryAllocator
	self->pIWebSite = NULL
	self->pIThreadPool = NULL
	self->pRequest = NULL
	self->pResponse = NULL
	self->pWriter = NULL
	self->pReader = NULL
	self->pProcess = NULL
	self->pOutputBuffer = NULL
	self->dwOutputSize = 0
End Sub

Private Sub UnInitializeHttpCgiProcessor( _
		ByVal self As HttpCgiProcessor Ptr _
	)
	If self->pProcess Then
		Delete self->pProcess
		self->pProcess = NULL
	End If
	If self->pOutputBuffer Then
		IMalloc_Free(self->pIMemoryAllocator, self->pOutputBuffer)
		self->pOutputBuffer = NULL
	End If
	If self->pRequest Then
		IClientRequest_Release(self->pRequest)
	End If
	If self->pResponse Then
		IServerResponse_Release(self->pResponse)
	End If
	If self->pWriter Then
		IHttpAsyncWriter_Release(self->pWriter)
	End If
	If self->pReader Then
		IHttpAsyncReader_Release(self->pReader)
	End If
End Sub

Private Sub DestroyHttpCgiProcessor( _
		ByVal self As HttpCgiProcessor Ptr _
	)
	Dim pIMemoryAllocator As IMalloc Ptr = self->pIMemoryAllocator
	UnInitializeHttpCgiProcessor(self)
	IMalloc_Free(pIMemoryAllocator, self)
	IMalloc_Release(pIMemoryAllocator)
End Sub

Private Function HttpCgiProcessorAddRef( _
		ByVal self As HttpCgiProcessor Ptr _
	)As ULONG
	Return 1
End Function

Private Function HttpCgiProcessorRelease( _
		ByVal self As HttpCgiProcessor Ptr _
	)As ULONG
	Return 0
End Function

Private Function HttpCgiProcessorQueryInterface( _
		ByVal self As HttpCgiProcessor Ptr, _
		ByVal riid As REFIID, _
		ByVal ppv As Any Ptr Ptr _
	)As HRESULT
	If IsEqualIID(@IID_IHttpCgiAsyncProcessor, riid) Then
		*ppv = @self->lpVtbl
	Else
		If IsEqualIID(@IID_IHttpAsyncProcessor, riid) Then
			*ppv = @self->lpVtbl
		Else
			If IsEqualIID(@IID_IUnknown, riid) Then
				*ppv = @self->lpVtbl
			Else
				*ppv = NULL
				Return E_NOINTERFACE
			End If
		End If
	End If
	HttpCgiProcessorAddRef(self)
	Return S_OK
End Function

Public Function CreateHttpCgiProcessor( _
		ByVal pIMemoryAllocator As IMalloc Ptr, _
		ByVal riid As REFIID, _
		ByVal ppv As Any Ptr Ptr _
)As HRESULT
	Dim self As HttpCgiProcessor Ptr = IMalloc_Alloc( _
		pIMemoryAllocator, _
		SizeOf(HttpCgiProcessor) _
	)
	If self Then
		InitializeHttpCgiProcessor(self, pIMemoryAllocator)

		Dim hrQueryInterface As HRESULT = HttpCgiProcessorQueryInterface( _
			self, _
			riid, _
			ppv _
		)
		If FAILED(hrQueryInterface) Then
			DestroyHttpCgiProcessor(self)
		End If
		Return hrQueryInterface
	End If
	*ppv = NULL
	Return E_OUTOFMEMORY
End Function

' --------------- āńļīģīćąņåėüķūå ōóķźöčč CGI ---------------
Private Function BuildCgiEnvironmentBlock( _
		ByVal self As HttpCgiProcessor Ptr, _
		ByVal pszExe As WString Ptr, _
		ByVal pszArgs As WString Ptr, _
		ByVal pszWorkDir As WString Ptr, _
		ByVal pszEnvironment As WString Ptr Ptr _
	)As HRESULT

	' Āńå īį’ēąņåėüķūå ļåšåģåķķūå īźšóęåķč’ + HTTP_* ēąćīėīāźč.
	' Šąēģåłąåģ ā äčķąģč÷åńźč āūäåėåķķīé ļąģ’ņč double-null-terminated.
	Const MaxBlockSize As DWORD = 32768
	Dim pEnv As WString Ptr = IMalloc_Alloc(self->pIMemoryAllocator, MaxBlockSize * SizeOf(WString))
	If pEnv = NULL Then Return E_OUTOFMEMORY

	Dim writer As ArrayStringWriter
	InitializeArrayStringWriter(@writer)
	writer.SetBuffer(pEnv, MaxBlockSize)

	' ļåšåģåķķūå īźšóęåķč’ (ēķą÷åķč’  ļóńņūå ńņšīźč, åńėč ķå čēāåńņķū)
	writer.WriteStringLine(WStr("GATEWAY_INTERFACE=CGI/1.1"))
	writer.WriteStringLine(WStr("SERVER_SOFTWARE=Station922/1.0"))
	writer.WriteStringLine(WStr("SERVER_PROTOCOL=HTTP/1.1"))

	' Čģ’ ńåšāåšą, ļīšņ (ēąćėóųźč)
	writer.WriteStringLine(WStr("SERVER_NAME=localhost"))
	writer.WriteStringLine(WStr("SERVER_PORT=80"))

	' Ģåņīä
	Dim HttpMethod As HeapBSTR = Any
	IClientRequest_GetHttpMethod(self->pRequest, @HttpMethod)
	writer.WriteString(WStr("REQUEST_METHOD="))
	If HttpMethod Then
		writer.WriteString(HttpMethod)
	End If
	writer.WriteNewLine()
	HeapSysFreeString(HttpMethod)

	' SCRIPT_NAME č PATH_TRANSLATED (ēąćėóųźč)
	Dim ScriptName As HeapBSTR = Any
	' Ļīėó÷ąåģ URI ļóņü
	Dim pClientUri As IClientUri Ptr = Any
	IClientRequest_GetUri(self->pRequest, @pClientUri)
	If pClientUri Then
		IClientUri_GetPath(pClientUri, @ScriptName)
		IClientUri_Release(pClientUri)
	End If
	writer.WriteString(WStr("SCRIPT_NAME="))
	If ScriptName Then
		writer.WriteString(ScriptName)
	End If
	writer.WriteNewLine()
	Dim PhysicalDir As HeapBSTR = Any
	IWebSite_GetSitePhysicalDirectory(self->pIWebSite, @PhysicalDir)
	Dim PhysicalScript As HeapBSTR = Any
	' TODO: ńźėåčņü PhysicalDir č ScriptName
	If PhysicalDir Then
		writer.WriteString(WStr("PATH_TRANSLATED="))
		writer.WriteString(PhysicalDir)
		If ScriptName Then writer.WriteString(ScriptName)
		writer.WriteNewLine()
		HeapSysFreeString(PhysicalDir)
	End If
	HeapSysFreeString(ScriptName)

	' QUERY_STRING
	Dim Query As HeapBSTR = Any
	If pClientUri Then
		' óęå īńāīįīęäøķ
	End If
	' óļšīłøķķī: ļīėó÷ąåģ čē īščćčķąėüķīćī URI
	Dim OriginalUri As HeapBSTR = Any
	If pClientUri Then ' ķī óęå īńāīįīęäøķ
	End If
	' TODO: čēāėå÷ü query čē OriginalUri
	writer.WriteStringLine(WStr("QUERY_STRING="))

	' CONTENT_TYPE, CONTENT_LENGTH
	Dim ContentType As HeapBSTR = Any
	IClientRequest_GetHttpHeader(self->pRequest, HttpRequestHeaders.HeaderContentType, @ContentType)
	writer.WriteString(WStr("CONTENT_TYPE="))
	If ContentType Then writer.WriteString(ContentType)
	writer.WriteNewLine()
	HeapSysFreeString(ContentType)

	Dim ContentLength As LongInt = Any
	IClientRequest_GetContentLength(self->pRequest, @ContentLength)
	writer.WriteString(WStr("CONTENT_LENGTH="))
	Dim clBuffer As WString * 32 = Any
	_ui64tow(ContentLength, @clBuffer, 10)
	writer.WriteString(@clBuffer)
	writer.WriteNewLine()

	' AUTH_TYPE, REMOTE_* (ēąćėóųźč)
	writer.WriteStringLine(WStr("AUTH_TYPE="))
	writer.WriteStringLine(WStr("REMOTE_ADDR="))
	writer.WriteStringLine(WStr("REMOTE_HOST="))
	writer.WriteStringLine(WStr("REMOTE_IDENT="))
	writer.WriteStringLine(WStr("REMOTE_USER="))

	' HTTP_* ēąćīėīāźč
	Dim HeaderIndex As HttpRequestHeaders = Any
	For HeaderIndex = 0 To HttpRequestHeadersSize - 1
		Dim HeaderValue As HeapBSTR = Any
		IClientRequest_GetHttpHeader(self->pRequest, HeaderIndex, @HeaderValue)
		If HeaderValue Then
			Dim Name As WString * 256 = Any
			Dim pName As WString Ptr = @Name
			' Čģ’ CGI-ļåšåģåķķīé
			Dim cgiName As WString * 256 = Any
			lstrcpyW(@cgiName, WStr("HTTP_"))
			Dim knownLen As Integer
			Dim pKnown As WString Ptr = KnownCgiHeaderToString(HeaderIndex, @knownLen)
			If pKnown Then
				lstrcatW(@cgiName, pKnown)
			Else
				' Ēąļąńķīé āąščąķņ: źīķāåšņčšóåģ ēąćīėīāīź āšó÷ķóž (īļółåķī)
			End If
			' Ēąģåķ’åģ '-' ķą '_' (óęå āūļīėķåķī ā KnownCgiHeaderToString)
			writer.WriteString(@cgiName)
			writer.WriteChar(Characters.EqualsSign)
			writer.WriteString(HeaderValue)
			writer.WriteNewLine()
			HeapSysFreeString(HeaderValue)
		End If
	Next

	' Ēąāåšųąžłčé äāīéķīé null óęå ļščńóņńņāóåņ, ņ.ź. writer ēąāåšųąåņ ńņšīźó ķóėøģ.
	*pszEnvironment = pEnv
	Return S_OK
End Function

Private Function PathEndsWithCgiExtension( _
		ByVal pszPath As WString Ptr, _
		ByVal ppExtensions As HeapBSTR, _
		ByVal pResult As Boolean Ptr _
	)As HRESULT
	' ppExtensions  šąēäåėøķķūé ņī÷źīé ń ēąļ’ņīé ńļčńīź šąńųčšåķčé
	' Ļšīāåš’åģ źąęäīå šąńųčšåķčå
	*pResult = False
	Return S_OK
End Function

Private Sub LogCgiOperation( _
		ByVal self As HttpCgiProcessor Ptr, _
		ByVal pwszText As WString Ptr, _
		ByVal Reason As LogEntryType _
	)
	Dim vd As VARIANT = Any
	VariantInit(@vd)
	LogWriteEntry(Reason, pwszText, @vd)
End Sub

' --------------- DirectProcessor ---------------
Private Function HttpCgiProcessorPrepare( _
		ByVal self As HttpCgiProcessor Ptr, _
		ByVal pContext As ProcessorContext Ptr, _
		ByVal ppIBuffer As IAttributedAsyncStream Ptr Ptr _
	)As HRESULT

	*ppIBuffer = NULL

	' ńīõšąķ’åģ čķņåšōåéńū
	self->pRequest = pContext->pIRequest
	IClientRequest_AddRef(self->pRequest)
	self->pResponse = pContext->pIResponse
	IServerResponse_AddRef(self->pResponse)
	self->pWriter = pContext->pIWriter
	IHttpAsyncWriter_AddRef(self->pWriter)
	self->pReader = pContext->pIReader
	IHttpAsyncReader_AddRef(self->pReader)

	self->pIWebSite = pContext->pIWebSite
	IWebSite_AddRef(self->pIWebSite)
	self->pIThreadPool = NULL ' ķå ńīõšąķ’åģ, ķī ģīęķī ļīėó÷čņü

	' Ųąć 1: šąńųčšåķčå CGI
	Dim pszPath As HeapBSTR = Any
	' Ļīėó÷čņü ōčēč÷åńźčé ļóņü ź ōąéėó
	' ... (šåąėčēąöč’ īļółåķą äė’ źšąņźīńņč)
	HeapSysFreeString(pszPath)

	' åńėč ķå CGI  āīēāšąłąåģ īųčįźó
	' Return WEBSITE_E_FILENOTFOUND

	Return S_OK ' óļšīłøķķī
End Function

Private Function HttpCgiProcessorBeginProcess( _
		ByVal self As HttpCgiProcessor Ptr, _
		ByVal pContext As ProcessorContext Ptr, _
		ByVal pcb As AsyncCallback, _
		ByVal StateObject As Any Ptr, _
		ByVal ppIAsyncResult As IAsyncResult Ptr Ptr _
	)As HRESULT

	Dim hrBeginWrite As HRESULT = IHttpAsyncWriter_BeginWrite( _
		self->pWriter, _
		pcb, _
		StateObject, _
		ppIAsyncResult _
	)
	If FAILED(hrBeginWrite) Then Return hrBeginWrite
	Return HTTPASYNCPROCESSOR_S_IO_PENDING
End Function

Private Function HttpCgiProcessorEndProcess( _
		ByVal self As HttpCgiProcessor Ptr, _
		ByVal pContext As ProcessorContext Ptr, _
		ByVal pIAsyncResult As IAsyncResult Ptr _
	)As HRESULT

	Dim hrEndWrite As HRESULT = IHttpAsyncWriter_EndWrite( _
		self->pWriter, _
		pIAsyncResult _
	)
	If FAILED(hrEndWrite) Then Return hrEndWrite

	Select Case hrEndWrite
		Case S_OK
			Return S_OK
		Case S_FALSE
			Return S_FALSE
		Case HTTPWRITER_S_IO_PENDING
			Return HTTPASYNCPROCESSOR_S_IO_PENDING
	End Select

	Return S_OK
End Function

' --------------- īįøšņźč äė’ vtable ---------------
Private Function IHttpCgiProcessorQueryInterface( _
		ByVal self As IHttpCgiAsyncProcessor Ptr, _
		ByVal riid As REFIID, _
		ByVal ppv As Any Ptr Ptr _
	)As HRESULT
	Return HttpCgiProcessorQueryInterface(CONTAINING_RECORD(self, HttpCgiProcessor, lpVtbl), riid, ppv)
End Function

Private Function IHttpCgiProcessorAddRef( _
		ByVal self As IHttpCgiAsyncProcessor Ptr _
	)As ULONG
	Return HttpCgiProcessorAddRef(CONTAINING_RECORD(self, HttpCgiProcessor, lpVtbl))
End Function

Private Function IHttpCgiProcessorRelease( _
		ByVal self As IHttpCgiAsyncProcessor Ptr _
	)As ULONG
	Return HttpCgiProcessorRelease(CONTAINING_RECORD(self, HttpCgiProcessor, lpVtbl))
End Function

Private Function IHttpCgiProcessorPrepare( _
		ByVal self As IHttpCgiAsyncProcessor Ptr, _
		ByVal pContext As ProcessorContext Ptr, _
		ByVal ppIBuffer As IAttributedAsyncStream Ptr Ptr _
	)As HRESULT
	Return HttpCgiProcessorPrepare(CONTAINING_RECORD(self, HttpCgiProcessor, lpVtbl), pContext, ppIBuffer)
End Function

Private Function IHttpCgiProcessorBeginProcess( _
		ByVal self As IHttpCgiAsyncProcessor Ptr, _
		ByVal pContext As ProcessorContext Ptr, _
		ByVal pcb As AsyncCallback, _
		ByVal StateObject As Any Ptr, _
		ByVal ppIAsyncResult As IAsyncResult Ptr Ptr _
	)As HRESULT
	Return HttpCgiProcessorBeginProcess(CONTAINING_RECORD(self, HttpCgiProcessor, lpVtbl), pContext, pcb, StateObject, ppIAsyncResult)
End Function

Private Function IHttpCgiProcessorEndProcess( _
		ByVal self As IHttpCgiAsyncProcessor Ptr, _
		ByVal pContext As ProcessorContext Ptr, _
		ByVal pIAsyncResult As IAsyncResult Ptr _
	)As HRESULT
	Return HttpCgiProcessorEndProcess(CONTAINING_RECORD(self, HttpCgiProcessor, lpVtbl), pContext, pIAsyncResult)
End Function

Dim GlobalHttpCgiProcessorVirtualTable As Const IHttpCgiAsyncProcessorVirtualTable = Type( _
	@IHttpCgiProcessorQueryInterface, _
	@IHttpCgiProcessorAddRef, _
	@IHttpCgiProcessorRelease, _
	@IHttpCgiProcessorPrepare, _
	@IHttpCgiProcessorBeginProcess, _
	@IHttpCgiProcessorEndProcess _
)
```

#include once "HttpCgiProcessor.bi"
#include once "CharacterConstants.bi"
#include once "HeapBSTR.bi"
#include once "WebUtils.bi"
#include once "Http.bi"
#include once "windows.bi"
#include once "CgiProcess.bi"
#include once "CgiAsyncTask.bi"
#include once "Logger.bi"
#include once "ArrayStringWriter.bi"
#include once "IWebSite.bi"
#include once "IHttpAsyncWriter.bi"
#include once "IHttpAsyncReader.bi"
#include once "IHttpAsyncProcessor.bi"

Extern GlobalHttpCgiProcessorVirtualTable As Const IHttpCgiAsyncProcessorVirtualTable

Const CompareResultEqual As Long = 0
Const MaxCgiOutputBufferDefault As DWORD = 1024 * 64   ' 64 Źįąéņ

' --------------- MemoryAttributedAsyncStream (āńļīģīćąņåėüķą’ šåąėčēąöč’ IAttributedAsyncStream) ---------------
Type MemoryAttributedAsyncStream
	#if __FB_DEBUG__
		RttiClassName(15) As UByte
	#endif
	lpVtbl As Const IAttributedAsyncStreamVirtualTable Ptr
	ReferenceCounter As UInteger
	pData As Byte Ptr
	cbData As DWORD
	MimeType As MimeType
End Type

Private Function MemoryStreamAddRef( _
		ByVal self As MemoryAttributedAsyncStream Ptr _
	)As ULONG
	self->ReferenceCounter += 1
	Return 1
End Function

Private Function MemoryStreamRelease( _
		ByVal self As MemoryAttributedAsyncStream Ptr _
	)As ULONG
	self->ReferenceCounter -= 1
	If self->ReferenceCounter = 0 Then
		' Īńāīįīęäąåģ äąķķūå, åńėč ķóęķī
		If self->pData Then
			' Įóäåģ ń÷čņąņü, ÷ņī äąķķūå īńāīįīęäąžņń’ īņäåėüķī
		End If
	End If
	Return 1
End Function

Private Function MemoryStreamQueryInterface( _
		ByVal self As MemoryAttributedAsyncStream Ptr, _
		ByVal riid As REFIID, _
		ByVal ppv As Any Ptr Ptr _
	)As HRESULT
	If IsEqualIID(@IID_IAttributedAsyncStream, riid) Then
		*ppv = @self->lpVtbl
		MemoryStreamAddRef(self)
		Return S_OK
	Else
		If IsEqualIID(@IID_IUnknown, riid) Then
			*ppv = @self->lpVtbl
			MemoryStreamAddRef(self)
			Return S_OK
		Else
			*ppv = NULL
			Return E_NOINTERFACE
		End If
	End If
End Function

Private Function MemoryStreamGetLength( _
		ByVal self As MemoryAttributedAsyncStream Ptr, _
		ByVal pLength As LongInt Ptr _
	)As HRESULT
	*pLength = self->cbData
	Return S_OK
End Function

Private Function MemoryStreamGetContentType( _
		ByVal self As MemoryAttributedAsyncStream Ptr, _
		ByVal pMimeType As MimeType Ptr _
	)As HRESULT
	*pMimeType = self->MimeType
	Return S_OK
End Function

Private Function MemoryStreamGetLastFileModifiedDate( _
		ByVal self As MemoryAttributedAsyncStream Ptr, _
		ByVal pDate As FILETIME Ptr _
	)As HRESULT
	ZeroMemory(pDate, SizeOf(FILETIME))
	Return S_OK
End Function

Private Function MemoryStreamGetETag( _
		ByVal self As MemoryAttributedAsyncStream Ptr, _
		ByVal ppETag As HeapBSTR Ptr _
	)As HRESULT
	*ppETag = NULL
	Return S_OK
End Function

Private Function MemoryStreamGetLanguage( _
		ByVal self As MemoryAttributedAsyncStream Ptr, _
		ByVal ppLanguage As HeapBSTR Ptr _
	)As HRESULT
	*ppLanguage = NULL
	Return S_OK
End Function

Private Function MemoryStreamGetEncoding( _
		ByVal self As MemoryAttributedAsyncStream Ptr, _
		ByVal pZipMode As ZipModes Ptr _
	)As HRESULT
	*pZipMode = ZipModes.None
	Return S_OK
End Function

Private Function MemoryStreamRead( _
		ByVal self As MemoryAttributedAsyncStream Ptr, _
		ByVal Buffer As LPVOID, _
		ByVal Offset As LongInt, _
		ByVal Count As DWORD, _
		ByVal pReaded As DWORD Ptr _
	)As HRESULT
	If Offset + Count > self->cbData Then
		*pReaded = 0
		Return E_INVALIDARG
	End If
	CopyMemory(Buffer, @self->pData[Offset], Count)
	*pReaded = Count
	Return S_OK
End Function

Dim Shared MemoryAttributedAsyncStreamVTable As IAttributedAsyncStreamVirtualTable = Type( _
	CPtr(Any Ptr, ProcPtr(MemoryStreamQueryInterface)), _
	CPtr(Any Ptr, ProcPtr(MemoryStreamAddRef)), _
	CPtr(Any Ptr, ProcPtr(MemoryStreamRelease)), _
	CPtr(Any Ptr, ProcPtr(MemoryStreamGetLength)), _
	CPtr(Any Ptr, ProcPtr(MemoryStreamGetContentType)), _
	CPtr(Any Ptr, ProcPtr(MemoryStreamGetLastFileModifiedDate)), _
	CPtr(Any Ptr, ProcPtr(MemoryStreamGetETag)), _
	CPtr(Any Ptr, ProcPtr(MemoryStreamGetLanguage)), _
	CPtr(Any Ptr, ProcPtr(MemoryStreamGetEncoding)), _
	CPtr(Any Ptr, ProcPtr(MemoryStreamRead)) _
)

Private Function CreateMemoryAttributedAsyncStream( _
		ByVal pData As Byte Ptr, _
		ByVal cbData As DWORD, _
		ByVal pMime As MimeType Ptr _
	)As MemoryAttributedAsyncStream Ptr
	Dim self As MemoryAttributedAsyncStream Ptr = HeapAlloc(GetProcessHeap(), 0, SizeOf(MemoryAttributedAsyncStream))
	If self Then
		self->lpVtbl = @MemoryAttributedAsyncStreamVTable
		self->ReferenceCounter = 1
		self->pData = pData
		self->cbData = cbData
		If pMime Then
			self->MimeType = *pMime
		Else
			ZeroMemory(@self->MimeType, SizeOf(MimeType))
		End If
	End If
	Return self
End Function

' --------------- ēąćėóųźč źīķōčćóšąöčīķķūõ ōóķźöčé CGI (äīėęķū įūņü šåąėčēīāąķū ā IWebSite) ---------------
Declare Function IWebSite_GetCgiExtensions( _
	ByVal pIWebSite As IWebSite Ptr, _
	ByVal ppExtensions As HeapBSTR Ptr _
)As HRESULT

Declare Function IWebSite_GetCgiAllowedDirs( _
	ByVal pIWebSite As IWebSite Ptr, _
	ByVal ppDirs As HeapBSTR Ptr _
)As HRESULT

Declare Function IWebSite_GetCgiInterpreter( _
	ByVal pIWebSite As IWebSite Ptr, _
	ByVal Extension As HeapBSTR, _
	ByVal ppInterpreter As HeapBSTR Ptr _
)As HRESULT

Declare Function IWebSite_GetCgiTimeout( _
	ByVal pIWebSite As IWebSite Ptr, _
	ByVal pdwTimeout As DWORD Ptr _
)As HRESULT

Declare Function IWebSite_GetCgiMaxOutputSize( _
	ByVal pIWebSite As IWebSite Ptr, _
	ByVal pdwMaxOutput As DWORD Ptr _
)As HRESULT

' --------------- šåąėčēąöč’ HttpCgiProcessor ---------------
Type HttpCgiProcessor
	#if __FB_DEBUG__
		RttiClassName(15) As UByte
	#endif
	lpVtbl As Const IHttpCgiAsyncProcessorVirtualTable Ptr
	ReferenceCounter As UInteger
	pIMemoryAllocator As IMalloc Ptr
	pIWebSite As IWebSite Ptr
	pIThreadPool As IThreadPool Ptr

	' ńīõšąķøķķūå äąķķūå äė’ īįšąįīņźč
	pRequest As IClientRequest Ptr
	pResponse As IServerResponse Ptr
	pWriter As IHttpAsyncWriter Ptr
	pReader As IHttpAsyncReader Ptr

	' ļšīöåńń CGI
	pProcess As CgiProcess Ptr

	' įóōåš äė’ āūāīäą
	pOutputBuffer As Byte Ptr
	dwOutputSize As DWORD
	MimeContent As MimeType
End Type

Private Sub InitializeHttpCgiProcessor( _
		ByVal self As HttpCgiProcessor Ptr, _
		ByVal pIMemoryAllocator As IMalloc Ptr _
	)
	#if __FB_DEBUG__
		CopyMemory( _
			@self->RttiClassName(0), _
			@Str(RTTI_ID_HTTPCGIPROCESSOR), _
			UBound(self->RttiClassName) - LBound(self->RttiClassName) + 1 _
		)
	#endif
	self->lpVtbl = @GlobalHttpCgiProcessorVirtualTable
	self->ReferenceCounter = CUInt(-1)
	IMalloc_AddRef(pIMemoryAllocator)
	self->pIMemoryAllocator = pIMemoryAllocator
	self->pIWebSite = NULL
	self->pIThreadPool = NULL
	self->pRequest = NULL
	self->pResponse = NULL
	self->pWriter = NULL
	self->pReader = NULL
	self->pProcess = NULL
	self->pOutputBuffer = NULL
	self->dwOutputSize = 0
End Sub

Private Sub UnInitializeHttpCgiProcessor( _
		ByVal self As HttpCgiProcessor Ptr _
	)
	If self->pProcess Then
		Delete self->pProcess
		self->pProcess = NULL
	End If
	If self->pOutputBuffer Then
		IMalloc_Free(self->pIMemoryAllocator, self->pOutputBuffer)
		self->pOutputBuffer = NULL
	End If
	If self->pRequest Then IClientRequest_Release(self->pRequest)
	If self->pResponse Then IServerResponse_Release(self->pResponse)
	If self->pWriter Then IHttpAsyncWriter_Release(self->pWriter)
	If self->pReader Then IHttpAsyncReader_Release(self->pReader)
End Sub

Private Sub DestroyHttpCgiProcessor( _
		ByVal self As HttpCgiProcessor Ptr _
	)
	Dim pIMemoryAllocator As IMalloc Ptr = self->pIMemoryAllocator
	UnInitializeHttpCgiProcessor(self)
	IMalloc_Free(pIMemoryAllocator, self)
	IMalloc_Release(pIMemoryAllocator)
End Sub

Private Function HttpCgiProcessorAddRef( _
		ByVal self As HttpCgiProcessor Ptr _
	)As ULONG
	Return 1
End Function

Private Function HttpCgiProcessorRelease( _
		ByVal self As HttpCgiProcessor Ptr _
	)As ULONG
	Return 0
End Function

Private Function HttpCgiProcessorQueryInterface( _
		ByVal self As HttpCgiProcessor Ptr, _
		ByVal riid As REFIID, _
		ByVal ppv As Any Ptr Ptr _
	)As HRESULT
	If IsEqualIID(@IID_IHttpCgiAsyncProcessor, riid) Then
		*ppv = @self->lpVtbl
	Else
		If IsEqualIID(@IID_IHttpAsyncProcessor, riid) Then
			*ppv = @self->lpVtbl
		Else
			If IsEqualIID(@IID_IUnknown, riid) Then
				*ppv = @self->lpVtbl
			Else
				*ppv = NULL
				Return E_NOINTERFACE
			End If
		End If
	End If
	HttpCgiProcessorAddRef(self)
	Return S_OK
End Function

Public Function CreateHttpCgiProcessor( _
		ByVal pIMemoryAllocator As IMalloc Ptr, _
		ByVal riid As REFIID, _
		ByVal ppv As Any Ptr Ptr _
)As HRESULT
	Dim self As HttpCgiProcessor Ptr = IMalloc_Alloc( _
		pIMemoryAllocator, _
		SizeOf(HttpCgiProcessor) _
	)
	If self Then
		InitializeHttpCgiProcessor(self, pIMemoryAllocator)
		Dim hrQueryInterface As HRESULT = HttpCgiProcessorQueryInterface( _
			self, _
			riid, _
			ppv _
		)
		If FAILED(hrQueryInterface) Then
			DestroyHttpCgiProcessor(self)
		End If
		Return hrQueryInterface
	End If
	*ppv = NULL
	Return E_OUTOFMEMORY
End Function

' --------------- ėīćčšīāąķčå ---------------
Private Sub LogCgiOperation( _
		ByVal self As HttpCgiProcessor Ptr, _
		ByVal pwszText As WString Ptr, _
		ByVal Reason As LogEntryType _
	)
	Dim vd As VARIANT = Any
	VariantInit(@vd)
	LogWriteEntry(Reason, pwszText, @vd)
End Sub

' --------------- ōīšģčšīāąķčå īźšóęåķč’ CGI ---------------
Private Function BuildCgiEnvironmentBlock( _
		ByVal self As HttpCgiProcessor Ptr, _
		ByVal pszEnvironment As WString Ptr Ptr _
	)As HRESULT

	Const MaxBlockSize As DWORD = 32768
	Dim pEnv As WString Ptr = IMalloc_Alloc(self->pIMemoryAllocator, MaxBlockSize * SizeOf(WString))
	If pEnv = NULL Then Return E_OUTOFMEMORY

	Dim writer As ArrayStringWriter
	InitializeArrayStringWriter(@writer)
	writer.SetBuffer(pEnv, MaxBlockSize)

	writer.WriteStringLine(WStr("GATEWAY_INTERFACE=CGI/1.1"))
	writer.WriteStringLine(WStr("SERVER_SOFTWARE=Station922/1.0"))
	writer.WriteStringLine(WStr("SERVER_PROTOCOL=HTTP/1.1"))

	Dim ServerName As HeapBSTR = Any
	' ļīźą čńļīėüēóåģ ēąćėóųźó
	writer.WriteStringLine(WStr("SERVER_NAME=localhost"))
	writer.WriteStringLine(WStr("SERVER_PORT=80"))

	Dim HttpMethod As HeapBSTR = Any
	IClientRequest_GetHttpMethod(self->pRequest, @HttpMethod)
	writer.WriteString(WStr("REQUEST_METHOD="))
	If HttpMethod Then writer.WriteString(HttpMethod)
	writer.WriteNewLine()
	HeapSysFreeString(HttpMethod)

	Dim pClientUri As IClientUri Ptr = Any
	IClientRequest_GetUri(self->pRequest, @pClientUri)
	Dim ScriptName As HeapBSTR = Any
	Dim QueryString As HeapBSTR = Any
	If pClientUri Then
		IClientUri_GetPath(pClientUri, @ScriptName)
		IClientUri_GetQuery(pClientUri, @QueryString)
		IClientUri_Release(pClientUri)
	End If

	writer.WriteString(WStr("SCRIPT_NAME="))
	If ScriptName Then writer.WriteString(ScriptName)
	writer.WriteNewLine()

	Dim PhysicalDir As HeapBSTR = Any
	IWebSite_GetSitePhysicalDirectory(self->pIWebSite, @PhysicalDir)
	writer.WriteString(WStr("PATH_TRANSLATED="))
	If PhysicalDir Then
		writer.WriteString(PhysicalDir)
		If ScriptName Then writer.WriteString(ScriptName)
	End If
	writer.WriteNewLine()
	HeapSysFreeString(PhysicalDir)
	HeapSysFreeString(ScriptName)

	writer.WriteString(WStr("QUERY_STRING="))
	If QueryString Then writer.WriteString(QueryString)
	writer.WriteNewLine()
	HeapSysFreeString(QueryString)

	Dim ContentType As HeapBSTR = Any
	IClientRequest_GetHttpHeader(self->pRequest, HttpRequestHeaders.HeaderContentType, @ContentType)
	writer.WriteString(WStr("CONTENT_TYPE="))
	If ContentType Then writer.WriteString(ContentType)
	writer.WriteNewLine()
	HeapSysFreeString(ContentType)

	Dim ContentLength As LongInt = Any
	IClientRequest_GetContentLength(self->pRequest, @ContentLength)
	writer.WriteString(WStr("CONTENT_LENGTH="))
	Dim clBuffer As WString * 32 = Any
	_ui64tow(ContentLength, @clBuffer, 10)
	writer.WriteString(@clBuffer)
	writer.WriteNewLine()

	' īńņąėüķūå īį’ēąņåėüķūå ļåšåģåķķūå (ēąćėóųźč)
	writer.WriteStringLine(WStr("AUTH_TYPE="))
	writer.WriteStringLine(WStr("REMOTE_ADDR="))
	writer.WriteStringLine(WStr("REMOTE_HOST="))
	writer.WriteStringLine(WStr("REMOTE_IDENT="))
	writer.WriteStringLine(WStr("REMOTE_USER="))

	' HTTP_* ēąćīėīāźč
	Dim HeaderIndex As HttpRequestHeaders = Any
	For HeaderIndex = 0 To HttpRequestHeadersSize - 1
		Dim HeaderValue As HeapBSTR = Any
		IClientRequest_GetHttpHeader(self->pRequest, HeaderIndex, @HeaderValue)
		If HeaderValue Then
			Dim cgiName As WString * 256 = Any
			lstrcpyW(@cgiName, WStr("HTTP_"))
			Dim knownLen As Integer
			Dim pKnown As WString Ptr = KnownCgiHeaderToString(HeaderIndex, @knownLen)
			If pKnown Then
				lstrcatW(@cgiName, pKnown)
			End If
			writer.WriteString(@cgiName)
			writer.WriteChar(Characters.EqualsSign)
			writer.WriteString(HeaderValue)
			writer.WriteNewLine()
			HeapSysFreeString(HeaderValue)
		End If
	Next

	*pszEnvironment = pEnv
	Return S_OK
End Function

' --------------- ļšīāåšźą šąńųčšåķčé CGI ---------------
Private Function IsCgiExtension( _
		ByVal pszPath As WString Ptr, _
		ByVal ppExtensions As HeapBSTR, _
		ByVal pResult As Boolean Ptr _
	)As HRESULT
	*pResult = False
	If ppExtensions = NULL Then Return S_FALSE
	Dim pExt As WString Ptr = ppExtensions
	While *pExt
		Dim pDot As WString Ptr = InStrRevW(pszPath, WStr("."))
		If pDot Then
			If lstrcmpiW(pDot, pExt) = CompareResultEqual Then
				*pResult = True
				Exit While
			End If
		End If
		pExt = pExt + lstrlenW(pExt) + 1
	Wend
	Return S_OK
End Function

' --------------- īńķīāķīé īįšąįīņ÷čź CGI (āūēūāąåņń’ ā Prepare) ---------------
Private Function ProcessCgiRequest( _
		ByVal self As HttpCgiProcessor Ptr, _
		ByVal ppBuffer As IAttributedAsyncStream Ptr Ptr _
	)As HRESULT

	*ppBuffer = NULL

	' Ųąć 1: šąńųčšåķčå č ńółåńņāīāąķčå ōąéėą
	Dim pszPhysicalPath As HeapBSTR = Any
	' Ļīėó÷ąåģ ōčēč÷åńźčé ļóņü ź ńźščļņó (āūēīā IWebSite)
	' Óļšīłøķķī: čńļīėüēóåģ SCRIPT_FILENAME
	' ... ēäåńü ķóęķī čēāėå÷ü ļīėķūé ļóņü. Īļółåķī äė’ źšąņźīńņč.

	Dim dwAttrib As DWORD = GetFileAttributesW(pszPhysicalPath)
	If dwAttrib = INVALID_FILE_ATTRIBUTES Then
		HeapSysFreeString(pszPhysicalPath)
		IServerResponse_SetStatusCode(self->pResponse, HttpStatusCodes.NotFound)
		LogCgiOperation(self, WStr("CGI: file not found"), LogEntryType.Warning)
		Return HTTPREADER_E_SOCKETERROR ' 404
	End If

	If (dwAttrib And FILE_ATTRIBUTE_DIRECTORY) Then
		HeapSysFreeString(pszPhysicalPath)
		IServerResponse_SetStatusCode(self->pResponse, HttpStatusCodes.Forbidden)
		LogCgiOperation(self, WStr("CGI: directory requested"), LogEntryType.Warning)
		Return HTTPREADER_E_SOCKETERROR
	End If

	' Ųąć 1: ļšīāåšźą šąńųčšåķč’ CGI
	Dim pCgiExtensions As HeapBSTR = Any
	IWebSite_GetCgiExtensions(self->pIWebSite, @pCgiExtensions)
	Dim bIsCgi As Boolean = False
	IsCgiExtension(pszPhysicalPath, pCgiExtensions, @bIsCgi)
	HeapSysFreeString(pCgiExtensions)
	If bIsCgi = False Then
		HeapSysFreeString(pszPhysicalPath)
		' ķå ķąų ļšīöåńńīš
		Return E_NOTIMPL
	End If

	' Ųąć 2: šąēšåųøķķūå äčšåźņīščč
	Dim pAllowedDirs As HeapBSTR = Any
	IWebSite_GetCgiAllowedDirs(self->pIWebSite, @pAllowedDirs)
	If pAllowedDirs Then
		Dim bInDir As Boolean = False
		Dim pDir As WString Ptr = pAllowedDirs
		While *pDir
			' ļšīńņą’ ļšīāåšźą ķą÷ąėą ļóņč
			If LeftW(pszPhysicalPath, lstrlenW(pDir)) = pDir Then
				bInDir = True
				Exit While
			End If
			pDir = pDir + lstrlenW(pDir) + 1
		Wend
		If bInDir = False Then
			HeapSysFreeString(pszPhysicalPath)
			HeapSysFreeString(pAllowedDirs)
			IServerResponse_SetStatusCode(self->pResponse, HttpStatusCodes.Forbidden)
			LogCgiOperation(self, WStr("CGI: outside allowed dirs"), LogEntryType.Warning)
			Return HTTPREADER_E_SOCKETERROR
		End If
		HeapSysFreeString(pAllowedDirs)
	End If

	' Ųąć 3: ļåšåģåķķūå īźšóęåķč’
	Dim pszEnv As WString Ptr = Any
	Dim hrEnv As HRESULT = BuildCgiEnvironmentBlock(self, @pszEnv)
	If FAILED(hrEnv) Then
		HeapSysFreeString(pszPhysicalPath)
		IServerResponse_SetStatusCode(self->pResponse, HttpStatusCodes.InternalServerError)
		Return hrEnv
	End If

	' Ųąć 4: čķņåšļšåņąņīš
	Dim pExtension As HeapBSTR = Any
	Dim pDot As WString Ptr = InStrRevW(pszPhysicalPath, WStr("."))
	If pDot Then
		pExtension = SysAllocString(pDot)
	Else
		pExtension = SysAllocString(WStr(""))
	End If
	Dim Interpreter As HeapBSTR = Any
	IWebSite_GetCgiInterpreter(self->pIWebSite, pExtension, @Interpreter)
	HeapSysFreeString(pExtension)

	Dim pszCmdLine As WString Ptr
	If Interpreter Then
		' ōīšģčšóåģ ńņšīźó: "Čķņåšļšåņąņīš Ąšćóģåķņū"
		Dim buf As WString * MAX_PATH = Any
		lstrcpyW(@buf, Interpreter)
		lstrcatW(@buf, WStr(" "))
		lstrcatW(@buf, pszPhysicalPath)
		pszCmdLine = @buf
	Else
		pszCmdLine = pszPhysicalPath
	End If

	' Ųąć 5: ēąļóńź ļšīöåńńą
	Dim proc As CgiProcess
	proc.Constructor()
	Dim hrStart As HRESULT = proc.StartProcess( _
		pszPhysicalPath, _
		pszCmdLine, _
		pszEnv, _
		NULL _
	)
	IMalloc_Free(self->pIMemoryAllocator, pszEnv) ' īźšóęåķčå įīėüųå ķå ķóęķī
	If FAILED(hrStart) Then
		' 500
		HeapSysFreeString(pszPhysicalPath)
		HeapSysFreeString(Interpreter)
		IServerResponse_SetStatusCode(self->pResponse, HttpStatusCodes.InternalServerError)
		LogCgiOperation(self, WStr("CGI: cannot create process"), LogEntryType.Error)
		Return HTTPREADER_E_SOCKETERROR
	End If
	self->pProcess = @proc
	HeapSysFreeString(pszPhysicalPath)
	HeapSysFreeString(Interpreter)

	' Ųąć 6: ēąļčńü ņåėą ēąļšīńą ā stdin
	Dim ContentLength As LongInt = Any
	IClientRequest_GetContentLength(self->pRequest, @ContentLength)
	If ContentLength > 0 Then
		Dim pStdinData As Byte Ptr = IMalloc_Alloc(self->pIMemoryAllocator, ContentLength)
		' ÷ņåķčå äąķķūõ čē ļūėåāīćī ļīņīźą (÷čņąåģ ńčķõšīķķī äė’ ļšīńņīņū)
		' Ēäåńü ķóęķī ń÷čņąņü čē pReader, ķī äė’ ļščģåšą ļšīļółåķī.
		IMalloc_Free(self->pIMemoryAllocator, pStdinData)
	Else
		CloseHandle(proc.hStdinWrite)
	End If

	' Ųąć 7: ņąéģąóņ
	Dim dwTimeout As DWORD = WaitTimeoutMsDefault
	IWebSite_GetCgiTimeout(self->pIWebSite, @dwTimeout)
	Dim bCompleted As Boolean = proc.WaitForExit(dwTimeout)
	If bCompleted = False Then
		proc.Terminate()
		IServerResponse_SetStatusCode(self->pResponse, HttpStatusCodes.GatewayTimeout)
		LogCgiOperation(self, WStr("CGI: timeout"), LogEntryType.Warning)
		Return HTTPREADER_E_SOCKETERROR
	End If

	' Ųąć 8: ÷ņåķčå stdout
	Dim dwMaxOutput As DWORD = 0
	IWebSite_GetCgiMaxOutputSize(self->pIWebSite, @dwMaxOutput)
	If dwMaxOutput = 0 Then dwMaxOutput = MaxCgiOutputBufferDefault
	Dim pOutput As Byte Ptr = IMalloc_Alloc(self->pIMemoryAllocator, dwMaxOutput)
	Dim dwTotalRead As DWORD = 0
	Dim dwRead As DWORD = 0
	Dim buf As Byte Ptr = IMalloc_Alloc(self->pIMemoryAllocator, 4096)
	While True
		If ReadFile(proc.hStdoutRead, buf, 4096, @dwRead, NULL) = 0 Or dwRead = 0 Then Exit While
		If dwTotalRead + dwRead > dwMaxOutput Then
			proc.Terminate()
			IMalloc_Free(self->pIMemoryAllocator, pOutput)
			IMalloc_Free(self->pIMemoryAllocator, buf)
			IServerResponse_SetStatusCode(self->pResponse, HttpStatusCodes.BadGateway)
			LogCgiOperation(self, WStr("CGI: output too large"), LogEntryType.Warning)
			Return HTTPREADER_E_SOCKETERROR
		End If
		CopyMemory(@pOutput[dwTotalRead], buf, dwRead)
		dwTotalRead += dwRead
	Wend
	IMalloc_Free(self->pIMemoryAllocator, buf)
	self->pOutputBuffer = pOutput
	self->dwOutputSize = dwTotalRead

	' Ųąć 9: ļąšńčķć ēąćīėīāźīā
	Dim bNPH As Boolean = False ' nph-*
	Dim pHeaderEnd As Byte Ptr = NULL
	' čłåģ \r\n\r\n
	Dim i As DWORD
	For i = 0 To dwTotalRead - 3
		If pOutput[i] = 13 And pOutput[i+1] = 10 And pOutput[i+2] = 13 And pOutput[i+3] = 10 Then
			pHeaderEnd = @pOutput[i + 4]
			Exit For
		End If
	Next
	If pHeaderEnd = NULL Then
		' Ķåņ ēąāåšųąžłåé ļóńņīé ńņšīźč  īųčįźą 502
		IServerResponse_SetStatusCode(self->pResponse, HttpStatusCodes.BadGateway)
		LogCgiOperation(self, WStr("CGI: malformed response"), LogEntryType.Error)
		Return HTTPREADER_E_SOCKETERROR
	End If

	' ļąšńčģ ēąćīėīāźč
	Dim pLine As Byte Ptr = pOutput
	Dim dwBodyOffset As DWORD = Cuint(pHeaderEnd - pOutput)
	Dim bHasStatus As Boolean = False
	While pLine < pHeaderEnd
		Dim pCrLf As Byte Ptr = memchr(pLine, 13, Cint(pHeaderEnd - pLine))
		If pCrLf = NULL Or pCrLf[1] <> 10 Then Exit While
		Dim LineLen As DWORD = pCrLf - pLine
		If LineLen > 0 Then
			' šąēįčāąåģ ķą čģ’: ēķą÷åķčå
			Dim pColon As Byte Ptr = memchr(pLine, Asc(":"), LineLen)
			If pColon Then
				Dim NameLength As DWORD = pColon - pLine
				Dim ValueStart As Byte Ptr = pColon + 1
				' ļšīļóńźąåģ ļšīįåėū
				While ValueStart < pCrLf And *ValueStart = Asc(" ") : ValueStart += 1 : Wend
				Dim ValueLength As DWORD = pCrLf - ValueStart
				If NameLength > 0 Then
					Dim HeaderName As HeapBSTR = SysAllocStringLen(NULL, NameLength)
					MultiByteToWideChar(CP_ACP, 0, pLine, NameLength, HeaderName, NameLength)
					Dim HeaderValue As HeapBSTR = SysAllocStringLen(NULL, ValueLength)
					MultiByteToWideChar(CP_ACP, 0, ValueStart, ValueLength, HeaderValue, ValueLength)
					If lstrcmpiW(HeaderName, WStr("Status")) = CompareResultEqual Then
						Dim statusCode As Long = CLng(ValWStr(HeaderValue))
						IServerResponse_SetStatusCode(self->pResponse, statusCode)
						bHasStatus = True
					ElseIf lstrcmpiW(HeaderName, WStr("Content-Type")) = CompareResultEqual Then
						' ńīõšąķ’åģ MIME
						' ļšåīįšąēīāąķčå īļółåķī
					ElseIf lstrcmpiW(HeaderName, WStr("Location")) = CompareResultEqual Then
						IServerResponse_SetStatusCode(self->pResponse, HttpStatusCodes.Found) ' 302
						IServerResponse_AddKnownResponseHeaderWstr( _
							self->pResponse, _
							HttpResponseHeaders.HeaderLocation, _
							HeaderValue _
						)
					Else
						IServerResponse_AddResponseHeader( _
							self->pResponse, _
							HeaderName, _
							HeaderValue _
						)
					End If
					HeapSysFreeString(HeaderName)
					HeapSysFreeString(HeaderValue)
				End If
			End If
		End If
		pLine = pCrLf + 2
	Wend

	' ņåėī īņāåņą
	Dim pBody As Byte Ptr = @pOutput[dwBodyOffset]
	Dim dwBody As DWORD = dwTotalRead - dwBodyOffset

	' Ųąć 10: ļšīāåšźą źīäą ēąāåšųåķč’
	If proc.GetExitCode() <> 0 And dwBody = 0 Then
		IServerResponse_SetStatusCode(self->pResponse, HttpStatusCodes.BadGateway)
		LogCgiOperation(self, WStr("CGI: exit code != 0 without body"), LogEntryType.Error)
		Return HTTPREADER_E_SOCKETERROR
	End If

	' Ųąć 11: ļīäćīņīāźą īņāåņą ÷åšåē writer
	Dim hrPrepare As HRESULT = IHttpAsyncWriter_Prepare( _
		self->pWriter, _
		self->pResponse, _
		dwBody, _
		FileAccess.ReadAccess _
	)
	If FAILED(hrPrepare) Then
		Return hrPrepare
	End If

	' ńīēäąøģ IAttributedAsyncStream čē ņåėą īņāåņą
	Dim pMemStream As MemoryAttributedAsyncStream Ptr = CreateMemoryAttributedAsyncStream( _
		pBody, _
		dwBody, _
		IIf(bHasStatus, NULL, @self->MimeContent) _
	)
	If pMemStream = NULL Then Return E_OUTOFMEMORY

	IHttpAsyncWriter_SetBuffer(self->pWriter, CPtr(IAttributedAsyncStream Ptr, @pMemStream->lpVtbl))

	' ļåšåäąøģ āėąäåķčå āūēūāąžłåģó źīäó
	*ppBuffer = CPtr(IAttributedAsyncStream Ptr, @pMemStream->lpVtbl)
	Return S_OK
End Function

' --------------- šåąėčēąöč’ IHttpCgiAsyncProcessor ---------------
Private Function HttpCgiProcessorPrepare( _
		ByVal self As HttpCgiProcessor Ptr, _
		ByVal pContext As ProcessorContext Ptr, _
		ByVal ppIBuffer As IAttributedAsyncStream Ptr Ptr _
	)As HRESULT

	*ppIBuffer = NULL
	' ńīõšąķ’åģ čķņåšōåéńū
	self->pRequest = pContext->pIRequest
	IClientRequest_AddRef(self->pRequest)
	self->pResponse = pContext->pIResponse
	IServerResponse_AddRef(self->pResponse)
	self->pWriter = pContext->pIWriter
	IHttpAsyncWriter_AddRef(self->pWriter)
	self->pReader = pContext->pIReader
	IHttpAsyncReader_AddRef(self->pReader)

	self->pIWebSite = pContext->pIWebSite
	IWebSite_AddRef(self->pIWebSite)

	Dim hr As HRESULT = ProcessCgiRequest(self, ppIBuffer)
	Return hr
End Function

Private Function HttpCgiProcessorBeginProcess( _
		ByVal self As HttpCgiProcessor Ptr, _
		ByVal pContext As ProcessorContext Ptr, _
		ByVal pcb As AsyncCallback, _
		ByVal StateObject As Any Ptr, _
		ByVal ppIAsyncResult As IAsyncResult Ptr Ptr _
	)As HRESULT

	Dim hrBeginWrite As HRESULT = IHttpAsyncWriter_BeginWrite( _
		self->pWriter, _
		pcb, _
		StateObject, _
		ppIAsyncResult _
	)
	If FAILED(hrBeginWrite) Then Return hrBeginWrite
	Return HTTPASYNCPROCESSOR_S_IO_PENDING
End Function

Private Function HttpCgiProcessorEndProcess( _
		ByVal self As HttpCgiProcessor Ptr, _
		ByVal pContext As ProcessorContext Ptr, _
		ByVal pIAsyncResult As IAsyncResult Ptr _
	)As HRESULT

	Dim hrEndWrite As HRESULT = IHttpAsyncWriter_EndWrite( _
		self->pWriter, _
		pIAsyncResult _
	)
	If FAILED(hrEndWrite) Then Return hrEndWrite

	Select Case hrEndWrite
		Case S_OK
			Return S_OK
		Case S_FALSE
			Return S_FALSE
		Case HTTPWRITER_S_IO_PENDING
			Return HTTPASYNCPROCESSOR_S_IO_PENDING
	End Select

	Return S_OK
End Function

' --------------- īįøšņźč äė’ āčšņóąėüķīé ņąįėčöū ---------------
Private Function IHttpCgiProcessorQueryInterface( _
		ByVal

> litellm.Timeout: APITimeoutError - Request timed out. Error_str: The read operation timed out
